ff ;; id_disp bb ;; gg ==>[ ?y] ff ;; gg
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
rassociator f (id₁ b) g • (f ◃ lunitor g) = ?y
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
ff ◃◃ disp_lunitor gg =
transportb
  (λ x : f · (id₁ b · g) ==> f · g,
   ff ;; (id_disp bb ;; gg) ==>[ x] ff ;; gg)
  (rassociator_to_lassociator_pre (f ◃ lunitor g) 
     ?y ?q)
  (disp_lassociator ff (id_disp bb) gg •• ?yy)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
f · id₁ b · g ==> f · g
 exact (runitor f ▹ g).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
ff ;; id_disp bb ;; gg ==>[ runitor f ▹ g] ff ;; gg
 exact (disp_runitor ff ▹▹ gg).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
rassociator f (id₁ b) g • (f ◃ lunitor g) =
runitor f ▹ g
 apply lunitor_lwhisker.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
ff ◃◃ disp_lunitor gg =
transportb
  (λ x : f · (id₁ b · g) ==> f · g,
   ff ;; (id_disp bb ;; gg) ==>[ x] ff ;; gg)
  (rassociator_to_lassociator_pre (f ◃ lunitor g)
     (runitor f ▹ g) (lunitor_lwhisker f g))
  (disp_lassociator ff (id_disp bb) gg
   •• (disp_runitor ff ▹▹ gg))
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
transportb
  (λ x : f · (id₁ b · g) ==> f · g,
   ff ;; (id_disp bb ;; gg) ==>[ x] ff ;; gg)
  (rassociator_to_lassociator_pre (f ◃ lunitor g)
     (runitor f ▹ g) (lunitor_lwhisker f g))
  (disp_lassociator ff (id_disp bb) gg
   •• (disp_runitor ff ▹▹ gg)) = ff ◃◃ disp_lunitor gg

      
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
transportb
  (λ x : f · (id₁ b · g) ==> f · g,
   ff ;; (id_disp bb ;; gg) ==>[ x] ff ;; gg)
  (rassociator_to_lassociator_pre (f ◃ lunitor g)
     (runitor f ▹ g) (lunitor_lwhisker f g))
  (disp_lassociator ff (id_disp bb) gg
   •• (disp_runitor ff ▹▹ gg)) = ?b
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
?b = ff ◃◃ disp_lunitor gg

      
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
transportb
  (λ x : f · (id₁ b · g) ==> f · g,
   ff ;; (id_disp bb ;; gg) ==>[ x] ff ;; gg)
  (rassociator_to_lassociator_pre (f ◃ lunitor g)
     (runitor f ▹ g) (lunitor_lwhisker f g))
  (disp_lassociator ff (id_disp bb) gg
   •• (disp_runitor ff ▹▹ gg)) = ?b
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
disp_lassociator ff (id_disp bb) gg
•• (disp_runitor ff ▹▹ gg) = ?t2
 apply disp_runitor_rwhisker. 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
transportb
  (λ x : f · (id₁ b · g) ==> f · g,
   ff ;; (id_disp bb ;; gg) ==>[ x] ff ;; gg)
  (rassociator_to_lassociator_pre (f ◃ lunitor g)
     (runitor f ▹ g) (lunitor_lwhisker f g))
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · (id₁ b · g) ==> f · g,
      ff ;; (id_disp bb ;; gg) ==>[ α] ff ;; gg)
     (runitor_rwhisker f g) (ff ◃◃ disp_lunitor gg)) =
ff ◃◃ disp_lunitor gg

      
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
transportb
  (λ x : f · (id₁ b · g) ==> f · g,
   ff ;; (id_disp bb ;; gg) ==>[ x] ff ;; gg)
  (rassociator_to_lassociator_pre (f ◃ lunitor g)
     (runitor f ▹ g) (lunitor_lwhisker f g))
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · (id₁ b · g) ==> f · g,
      ff ;; (id_disp bb ;; gg) ==>[ α] ff ;; gg)
     (runitor_rwhisker f g) (ff ◃◃ disp_lunitor gg)) =
?b
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
?b = ff ◃◃ disp_lunitor gg

      
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
transportb
  (λ x : f · (id₁ b · g) ==> f · g,
   ff ;; (id_disp bb ;; gg) ==>[ x] ff ;; gg)
  (rassociator_to_lassociator_pre (f ◃ lunitor g)
     (runitor f ▹ g) (lunitor_lwhisker f g))
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · (id₁ b · g) ==> f · g,
      ff ;; (id_disp bb ;; gg) ==>[ α] ff ;; gg)
     (runitor_rwhisker f g) (ff ◃◃ disp_lunitor gg)) =
?b
 apply (transport_f_f (λ α, _ ==>[α] _)). 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
transportf
  (λ α : f · (id₁ b · g) ==> f · g,
   ff ;; (id_disp bb ;; gg) ==>[ α] ff ;; gg)
  (! runitor_rwhisker f g @
   ! rassociator_to_lassociator_pre (f ◃ lunitor g)
       (runitor f ▹ g) (lunitor_lwhisker f g))
  (ff ◃◃ disp_lunitor gg) = ff ◃◃ disp_lunitor gg

      
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
isaset (f · (id₁ b · g) ==> f · g)

      apply cellset_property.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
transportb
  (λ x : f · id₁ b · g ==> f · g,
   ff ;; id_disp bb ;; gg ==>[ x] ff ;; gg)
  (lunitor_lwhisker f g) (disp_runitor ff ▹▹ gg) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · id₁ b · g ==> f · g,
   ff ;; id_disp bb ;; gg ==>[ α] ff ;; gg)
  (lunitor_lwhisker f g) (disp_runitor ff ▹▹ gg)

  apply maponpaths_2, cellset_property.
Qed.



C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x, x': f1 ==> f2
p: x = x'
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff1: aa -->[ f1] bb
ff2: aa -->[ f2] bb
xx: ff1 ==>[ x] ff2
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
transportf (λ x : f1 ==> f2, ff1 ==>[ x] ff2) p xx
▹▹ gg =
transportf
  (λ x : f1 ==> f2, ff1 ;; gg ==>[ x ▹ g] ff2 ;; gg) p
  (xx ▹▹ gg)


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x, x': f1 ==> f2
p: x = x'
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff1: aa -->[ f1] bb
ff2: aa -->[ f2] bb
xx: ff1 ==>[ x] ff2
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
transportf (λ x : f1 ==> f2, ff1 ==>[ x] ff2) p xx
▹▹ gg =
transportf
  (λ x : f1 ==> f2, ff1 ;; gg ==>[ x ▹ g] ff2 ;; gg) p
  (xx ▹▹ gg)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f1 ==> f2
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff1: aa -->[ f1] bb
ff2: aa -->[ f2] bb
xx: ff1 ==>[ x] ff2
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
transportf (λ x : f1 ==> f2, ff1 ==>[ x] ff2)
  (idpath x) xx ▹▹ gg =
transportf
  (λ x : f1 ==> f2, ff1 ;; gg ==>[ x ▹ g] ff2 ;; gg)
  (idpath x) (xx ▹▹ gg)
 apply idpath.
Defined.


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x, x': f1 ==> f2
p: x = x'
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff1: aa -->[ f1] bb
ff2: aa -->[ f2] bb
xx: ff1 ==>[ x] ff2
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
transportf (λ x : f1 ==> f2, ff1 ==>[ x] ff2) p xx
▹▹ gg =
transportf
  (λ x : f1 · g ==> f2 · g,
   ff1 ;; gg ==>[ x] ff2 ;; gg)
  (maponpaths (λ x : f1 ==> f2, x ▹ g) p) (xx ▹▹ gg)


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x, x': f1 ==> f2
p: x = x'
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff1: aa -->[ f1] bb
ff2: aa -->[ f2] bb
xx: ff1 ==>[ x] ff2
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
transportf (λ x : f1 ==> f2, ff1 ==>[ x] ff2) p xx
▹▹ gg =
transportf
  (λ x : f1 · g ==> f2 · g,
   ff1 ;; gg ==>[ x] ff2 ;; gg)
  (maponpaths (λ x : f1 ==> f2, x ▹ g) p) (xx ▹▹ gg)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f1 ==> f2
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff1: aa -->[ f1] bb
ff2: aa -->[ f2] bb
xx: ff1 ==>[ x] ff2
gg: bb -->[ g] cc
transportf (λ x : f1 ==> f2, ff1 ==>[ x] ff2)
  (idpath x) xx ▹▹ gg =
transportf
  (λ x : f1 · g ==> f2 · g,
   ff1 ;; gg ==>[ x] ff2 ;; gg)
  (maponpaths (λ x : f1 ==> f2, x ▹ g) (idpath x))
  (xx ▹▹ gg)
 apply idpath.
Defined.


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x, x': g1 ==> g2
p: x = x'
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg1: bb -->[ g1] cc
gg2: bb -->[ g2] cc
xx: gg1 ==>[ x] gg2
ff
◃◃ transportf (λ x : g1 ==> g2, gg1 ==>[ x] gg2) p xx =
transportf
  (λ x : f · g1 ==> f · g2,
   ff ;; gg1 ==>[ x] ff ;; gg2)
  (maponpaths (λ x : g1 ==> g2, f ◃ x) p) (ff ◃◃ xx)


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x, x': g1 ==> g2
p: x = x'
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg1: bb -->[ g1] cc
gg2: bb -->[ g2] cc
xx: gg1 ==>[ x] gg2
ff
◃◃ transportf (λ x : g1 ==> g2, gg1 ==>[ x] gg2) p xx =
transportf
  (λ x : f · g1 ==> f · g2,
   ff ;; gg1 ==>[ x] ff ;; gg2)
  (maponpaths (λ x : g1 ==> g2, f ◃ x) p) (ff ◃◃ xx)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g1 ==> g2
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg1: bb -->[ g1] cc
gg2: bb -->[ g2] cc
xx: gg1 ==>[ x] gg2
ff
◃◃ transportf (λ x : g1 ==> g2, gg1 ==>[ x] gg2)
     (idpath x) xx =
transportf
  (λ x : f · g1 ==> f · g2,
   ff ;; gg1 ==>[ x] ff ;; gg2)
  (maponpaths (λ x : g1 ==> g2, f ◃ x) (idpath x))
  (ff ◃◃ xx)
 apply idpath.
Defined.



C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g ==> h
φ: h ==> i
x: D a
y: D b
z: D c
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: y -->[ g] z
hh: y -->[ h] z
ii: y -->[ i] z
ηη: gg ==>[ η] hh
φφ: hh ==>[ φ] ii
ff ◃◃ (ηη •• φφ) =
transportf
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · i, ff ;; gg ==>[ α] ff ;; ii)
  (lwhisker_vcomp f η φ) ((ff ◃◃ ηη) •• (ff ◃◃ φφ))


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g ==> h
φ: h ==> i
x: D a
y: D b
z: D c
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: y -->[ g] z
hh: y -->[ h] z
ii: y -->[ i] z
ηη: gg ==>[ η] hh
φφ: hh ==>[ φ] ii
ff ◃◃ (ηη •• φφ) =
transportf
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · i, ff ;; gg ==>[ α] ff ;; ii)
  (lwhisker_vcomp f η φ) ((ff ◃◃ ηη) •• (ff ◃◃ φφ))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g ==> h
φ: h ==> i
x: D a
y: D b
z: D c
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: y -->[ g] z
hh: y -->[ h] z
ii: y -->[ i] z
ηη: gg ==>[ η] hh
φφ: hh ==>[ φ] ii
transportf
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · i, ff ;; gg ==>[ α] ff ;; ii)
  (lwhisker_vcomp f η φ) ((ff ◃◃ ηη) •• (ff ◃◃ φφ)) =
ff ◃◃ (ηη •• φφ)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g ==> h
φ: h ==> i
x: D a
y: D b
z: D c
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: y -->[ g] z
hh: y -->[ h] z
ii: y -->[ i] z
ηη: gg ==>[ η] hh
φφ: hh ==>[ φ] ii
(ff ◃◃ ηη) •• (ff ◃◃ φφ) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · i, ff ;; gg ==>[ α] ff ;; ii)
  (lwhisker_vcomp f η φ) (ff ◃◃ (ηη •• φφ))

  apply disp_lwhisker_vcomp.
Qed.


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
x: D a
y: D b
z: D c
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: x -->[ g] y
hh: x -->[ h] y
ii: y -->[ i] z
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
φφ: gg ==>[ φ] hh
(ηη •• φφ) ▹▹ ii =
transportf
  (λ α : f · i ==> h · i, ff ;; ii ==>[ α] hh ;; ii)
  (rwhisker_vcomp i η φ) ((ηη ▹▹ ii) •• (φφ ▹▹ ii))


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
x: D a
y: D b
z: D c
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: x -->[ g] y
hh: x -->[ h] y
ii: y -->[ i] z
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
φφ: gg ==>[ φ] hh
(ηη •• φφ) ▹▹ ii =
transportf
  (λ α : f · i ==> h · i, ff ;; ii ==>[ α] hh ;; ii)
  (rwhisker_vcomp i η φ) ((ηη ▹▹ ii) •• (φφ ▹▹ ii))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
x: D a
y: D b
z: D c
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: x -->[ g] y
hh: x -->[ h] y
ii: y -->[ i] z
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
φφ: gg ==>[ φ] hh
transportf
  (λ α : f · i ==> h · i, ff ;; ii ==>[ α] hh ;; ii)
  (rwhisker_vcomp i η φ) ((ηη ▹▹ ii) •• (φφ ▹▹ ii)) =
(ηη •• φφ) ▹▹ ii

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
x: D a
y: D b
z: D c
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: x -->[ g] y
hh: x -->[ h] y
ii: y -->[ i] z
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
φφ: gg ==>[ φ] hh
(ηη ▹▹ ii) •• (φφ ▹▹ ii) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · i ==> h · i, ff ;; ii ==>[ α] hh ;; ii)
  (rwhisker_vcomp i η φ) ((ηη •• φφ) ▹▹ ii)

  apply disp_rwhisker_vcomp.
Qed.


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: h ==> i
x: D a
y: D b
z: D c
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: x -->[ g] y
hh: y -->[ h] z
ii: y -->[ i] z
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
φφ: hh ==>[ φ] ii
(ff ◃◃ φφ) •• (ηη ▹▹ ii) =
transportf
  (λ α : f · h ==> g · i, ff ;; hh ==>[ α] gg ;; ii)
  (vcomp_whisker η φ) ((ηη ▹▹ hh) •• (gg ◃◃ φφ))


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: h ==> i
x: D a
y: D b
z: D c
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: x -->[ g] y
hh: y -->[ h] z
ii: y -->[ i] z
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
φφ: hh ==>[ φ] ii
(ff ◃◃ φφ) •• (ηη ▹▹ ii) =
transportf
  (λ α : f · h ==> g · i, ff ;; hh ==>[ α] gg ;; ii)
  (vcomp_whisker η φ) ((ηη ▹▹ hh) •• (gg ◃◃ φφ))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: h ==> i
x: D a
y: D b
z: D c
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: x -->[ g] y
hh: y -->[ h] z
ii: y -->[ i] z
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
φφ: hh ==>[ φ] ii
transportf
  (λ α : f · h ==> g · i, ff ;; hh ==>[ α] gg ;; ii)
  (vcomp_whisker η φ) ((ηη ▹▹ hh) •• (gg ◃◃ φφ)) =
(ff ◃◃ φφ) •• (ηη ▹▹ ii)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: h ==> i
x: D a
y: D b
z: D c
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: x -->[ g] y
hh: y -->[ h] z
ii: y -->[ i] z
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
φφ: hh ==>[ φ] ii
(ηη ▹▹ hh) •• (gg ◃◃ φφ) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · h ==> g · i, ff ;; hh ==>[ α] gg ;; ii)
  (vcomp_whisker η φ) ((ff ◃◃ φφ) •• (ηη ▹▹ ii))

  apply disp_vcomp_whisker.
Qed.


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
z: D c
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: y -->[ g] z
transportf
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g, ff ;; gg ==>[ α] ff ;; gg)
  (id2_rwhisker f g) (disp_id2 ff ▹▹ gg) =
disp_id2 (ff ;; gg)


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
z: D c
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: y -->[ g] z
transportf
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g, ff ;; gg ==>[ α] ff ;; gg)
  (id2_rwhisker f g) (disp_id2 ff ▹▹ gg) =
disp_id2 (ff ;; gg)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
z: D c
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: y -->[ g] z
disp_id2 ff ▹▹ gg =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g, ff ;; gg ==>[ α] ff ;; gg)
  (id2_rwhisker f g) (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg))

  apply disp_id2_rwhisker.
Qed.


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D a
y: D b
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: x -->[ g] y
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
disp_runitor ff •• ηη =
transportf
  (λ α : f · id₁ b ==> g, ff ;; id_disp y ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_runitor f g η)
  ((ηη ▹▹ id_disp y) •• disp_runitor gg)


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D a
y: D b
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: x -->[ g] y
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
disp_runitor ff •• ηη =
transportf
  (λ α : f · id₁ b ==> g, ff ;; id_disp y ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_runitor f g η)
  ((ηη ▹▹ id_disp y) •• disp_runitor gg)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D a
y: D b
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: x -->[ g] y
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
transportf
  (λ α : f · id₁ b ==> g, ff ;; id_disp y ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_runitor f g η)
  ((ηη ▹▹ id_disp y) •• disp_runitor gg) =
disp_runitor ff •• ηη

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D a
y: D b
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: x -->[ g] y
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
transportf
  (λ α : f · id₁ b ==> g, ff ;; id_disp y ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_runitor f g η)
  ((ηη ▹▹ id_disp y) •• disp_runitor gg) = ?b
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D a
y: D b
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: x -->[ g] y
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
?b = disp_runitor ff •• ηη

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D a
y: D b
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: x -->[ g] y
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
transportf
  (λ α : f · id₁ b ==> g, ff ;; id_disp y ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_runitor f g η)
  ((ηη ▹▹ id_disp y) •• disp_runitor gg) = ?b

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D a
y: D b
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: x -->[ g] y
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
(ηη ▹▹ id_disp y) •• disp_runitor gg = ?t2

    apply disp_vcomp_runitor.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D a
y: D b
ff: x -->[ f] y
gg: x -->[ g] y
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
transportf
  (λ α : f · id₁ b ==> g, ff ;; id_disp y ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_runitor f g η)
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · id₁ b ==> g,
      ff ;; id_disp y ==>[ α] gg)
     (vcomp_runitor f g η) (disp_runitor ff •• ηη)) =
disp_runitor ff •• ηη

  apply (transportfbinv (λ z, _ ==>[ z ] _) _ _).
Qed.


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ₁, ββ₂: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
p: αα •• ββ₁ = αα •• ββ₂
ββ₁ = ββ₂


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ₁, ββ₂: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
p: αα •• ββ₁ = αα •• ββ₂
ββ₁ = ββ₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ₁, ββ₂: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
p: αα •• ββ₁ = αα •• ββ₂
αα_cell:= αα,, Hαα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg
ββ₁ = ββ₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ₁, ββ₂: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
p: αα •• ββ₁ = αα •• ββ₂
αα_cell:= αα,, Hαα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg
q: (λ z : ff ==>[ α • β] hh,
 disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• z) 
  (αα •• ββ₁) =
(λ z : ff ==>[ α • β] hh,
 disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• z) 
  (αα •• ββ₂)
ββ₁ = ββ₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ₁, ββ₂: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
p: αα •• ββ₁ = αα •• ββ₂
αα_cell:= αα,, Hαα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg
q: disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• (αα •• ββ₁) =
disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• (αα •• ββ₂)
ββ₁ = ββ₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ₁, ββ₂: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
p: αα •• ββ₁ = αα •• ββ₂
αα_cell:= αα,, Hαα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg
q: transportb (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (vassocr Hα ^-1 α β)
  ((disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• αα) •• ββ₁) =
transportb (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (vassocr Hα ^-1 α β)
  ((disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• αα) •• ββ₂)
ββ₁ = ββ₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ₁, ββ₂: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
p: αα •• ββ₁ = αα •• ββ₂
αα_cell:= αα,, Hαα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg
q: transportb (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (vassocr Hα ^-1 α β)
  ((disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• αα) •• ββ₁) =
transportb (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (vassocr Hα ^-1 α β)
  ((disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• αα) •• ββ₂)
z:= disp_vcomp_linv αα_cell: disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• αα_cell =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_linv (make_invertible_2cell Hα))
  (disp_id2 gg)
ββ₁ = ββ₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ₁, ββ₂: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
p: αα •• ββ₁ = αα •• ββ₂
αα_cell:= αα,, Hαα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg
q: transportb (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (vassocr Hα ^-1 α β)
  ((disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• αα) •• ββ₁) =
transportb (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (vassocr Hα ^-1 α β)
  ((disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• αα) •• ββ₂)
z:= disp_vcomp_linv αα_cell: disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 gg)
ββ₁ = ββ₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ₁, ββ₂: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
p: αα •• ββ₁ = αα •• ββ₂
αα_cell:= αα,, Hαα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg
q: transportb (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (vassocr Hα ^-1 α β)
  (transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
     (vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 gg) •• ββ₁) =
transportb (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (vassocr Hα ^-1 α β)
  (transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
     (vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 gg) •• ββ₂)
z:= disp_vcomp_linv αα_cell: disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 gg)
ββ₁ = ββ₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ₁, ββ₂: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
p: αα •• ββ₁ = αα •• ββ₂
αα_cell:= αα,, Hαα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg
q: transportf (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (! vassocr Hα ^-1 α β)
  (transportf (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
     (! vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 gg) •• ββ₁) =
transportf (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (! vassocr Hα ^-1 α β)
  (transportf (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
     (! vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 gg) •• ββ₂)
z:= disp_vcomp_linv αα_cell: disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 gg)
ββ₁ = ββ₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ₁, ββ₂: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
p: αα •• ββ₁ = αα •• ββ₂
αα_cell:= αα,, Hαα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg
q: transportf (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (! vassocr Hα ^-1 α β)
  (transportf (λ x : g ==> h, gg ==>[ x] hh)
     (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
        (! vcomp_linv Hα)) 
     (disp_id2 gg •• ββ₁)) =
transportf (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (! vassocr Hα ^-1 α β)
  (transportf (λ x : g ==> h, gg ==>[ x] hh)
     (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
        (! vcomp_linv Hα)) 
     (disp_id2 gg •• ββ₂))
z:= disp_vcomp_linv αα_cell: disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 gg)
ββ₁ = ββ₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ₁, ββ₂: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
p: αα •• ββ₁ = αα •• ββ₂
αα_cell:= αα,, Hαα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg
q: transportf (λ x : g ==> h, gg ==>[ x] hh)
  (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
     (! vcomp_linv Hα) @ ! 
   vassocr Hα ^-1 α β) (disp_id2 gg •• ββ₁) =
transportf (λ x : g ==> h, gg ==>[ x] hh)
  (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
     (! vcomp_linv Hα) @ ! 
   vassocr Hα ^-1 α β) (disp_id2 gg •• ββ₂)
z:= disp_vcomp_linv αα_cell: disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 gg)
ββ₁ = ββ₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ₁, ββ₂: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
p: αα •• ββ₁ = αα •• ββ₂
αα_cell:= αα,, Hαα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg
q: transportf (λ x : g ==> h, gg ==>[ x] hh)
  (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
     (! vcomp_linv Hα) @ ! 
   vassocr Hα ^-1 α β)
  (transportb (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
     (id2_left β) ββ₁) =
transportf (λ x : g ==> h, gg ==>[ x] hh)
  (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
     (! vcomp_linv Hα) @ ! 
   vassocr Hα ^-1 α β)
  (transportb (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
     (id2_left β) ββ₂)
z:= disp_vcomp_linv αα_cell: disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 gg)
ββ₁ = ββ₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ₁, ββ₂: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
p: αα •• ββ₁ = αα •• ββ₂
αα_cell:= αα,, Hαα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg
q: transportf (λ x : g ==> h, gg ==>[ x] hh)
  (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
     (! vcomp_linv Hα) @ ! 
   vassocr Hα ^-1 α β)
  (transportf (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
     (! id2_left β) ββ₁) =
transportf (λ x : g ==> h, gg ==>[ x] hh)
  (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
     (! vcomp_linv Hα) @ ! 
   vassocr Hα ^-1 α β)
  (transportf (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
     (! id2_left β) ββ₂)
z:= disp_vcomp_linv αα_cell: disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 gg)
ββ₁ = ββ₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ₁, ββ₂: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
p: αα •• ββ₁ = αα •• ββ₂
αα_cell:= αα,, Hαα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg
q: transportf (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (! id2_left β @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
     (! vcomp_linv Hα) @ ! 
   vassocr Hα ^-1 α β) ββ₁ =
transportf (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (! id2_left β @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
     (! vcomp_linv Hα) @ ! 
   vassocr Hα ^-1 α β) ββ₂
z:= disp_vcomp_linv αα_cell: disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 gg)
ββ₁ = ββ₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ₁, ββ₂: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
p: αα •• ββ₁ = αα •• ββ₂
αα_cell:= αα,, Hαα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg
q: transportf (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (! id2_left β @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
     (! vcomp_linv Hα) @ ! 
   vassocr Hα ^-1 α β) ββ₁ =
transportf (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (! id2_left β @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
     (! vcomp_linv Hα) @ ! 
   vassocr Hα ^-1 α β) ββ₂
z:= disp_vcomp_linv αα_cell: disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 gg)
q':= transportb_transpose_right q: ββ₁ =
transportb (λ z : g ==> h, gg ==>[ z] hh)
  (! id2_left β @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
     (! vcomp_linv Hα) @ ! 
   vassocr Hα ^-1 α β)
  (transportf (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
     (! id2_left β @
      maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
        (! vcomp_linv Hα) @ ! 
      vassocr Hα ^-1 α β) ββ₂)
ββ₁ = ββ₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ₁, ββ₂: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
p: αα •• ββ₁ = αα •• ββ₂
αα_cell:= αα,, Hαα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell Hα) ff gg
q: transportf (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (! id2_left β @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
     (! vcomp_linv Hα) @ ! 
   vassocr Hα ^-1 α β) ββ₁ =
transportf (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (! id2_left β @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
     (! vcomp_linv Hα) @ ! 
   vassocr Hα ^-1 α β) ββ₂
z:= disp_vcomp_linv αα_cell: disp_inv_cell αα_cell •• αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 gg)
q': ββ₁ = ββ₂
ββ₁ = ββ₂

  exact q'.
Qed.


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα₁, αα₂: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hββ: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hβ ββ
p: αα₁ •• ββ = αα₂ •• ββ
αα₁ = αα₂


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα₁, αα₂: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hββ: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hβ ββ
p: αα₁ •• ββ = αα₂ •• ββ
αα₁ = αα₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα₁, αα₂: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hββ: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hβ ββ
p: αα₁ •• ββ = αα₂ •• ββ
q: (λ z : ff ==>[ α • β] hh, z •• pr1 Hββ)
  (αα₁ •• ββ) =
(λ z : ff ==>[ α • β] hh, z •• pr1 Hββ)
  (αα₂ •• ββ)
αα₁ = αα₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα₁, αα₂: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hββ: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hβ ββ
p: αα₁ •• ββ = αα₂ •• ββ
q: (αα₁ •• ββ) •• pr1 Hββ = (αα₂ •• ββ) •• pr1 Hββ
αα₁ = αα₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα₁, αα₂: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hββ: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hβ ββ
p: αα₁ •• ββ = αα₂ •• ββ
q: transportb (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (vassocl α β Hβ ^-1) (αα₁ •• (ββ •• pr1 Hββ)) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (vassocl α β Hβ ^-1) (αα₂ •• (ββ •• pr1 Hββ))
αα₁ = αα₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα₁, αα₂: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hββ: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hβ ββ
p: αα₁ •• ββ = αα₂ •• ββ
q: transportb (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (vassocl α β Hβ ^-1)
  (αα₁
   •• transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
        (vcomp_rinv Hβ) (disp_id2 gg)) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (vassocl α β Hβ ^-1)
  (αα₂
   •• transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
        (vcomp_rinv Hβ) (disp_id2 gg))
αα₁ = αα₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα₁, αα₂: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hββ: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hβ ββ
p: αα₁ •• ββ = αα₂ •• ββ
q: transportf (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1)
  (αα₁
   •• transportf (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
        (! vcomp_rinv Hβ) (disp_id2 gg)) =
transportf (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1)
  (αα₂
   •• transportf (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
        (! vcomp_rinv Hβ) (disp_id2 gg))
αα₁ = αα₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα₁, αα₂: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hββ: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hβ ββ
p: αα₁ •• ββ = αα₂ •• ββ
q: transportf (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1)
  (transportf (λ x : f ==> g, ff ==>[ x] gg)
     (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, α • h)
        (! vcomp_rinv Hβ)) (αα₁ •• disp_id2 gg)) =
transportf (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1)
  (transportf (λ x : f ==> g, ff ==>[ x] gg)
     (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, α • h)
        (! vcomp_rinv Hβ)) (αα₂ •• disp_id2 gg))
αα₁ = αα₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα₁, αα₂: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hββ: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hβ ββ
p: αα₁ •• ββ = αα₂ •• ββ
q: transportf (λ x : f ==> g, ff ==>[ x] gg)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, α • h)
     (! vcomp_rinv Hβ) @ ! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1)
  (αα₁ •• disp_id2 gg) =
transportf (λ x : f ==> g, ff ==>[ x] gg)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, α • h)
     (! vcomp_rinv Hβ) @ ! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1)
  (αα₂ •• disp_id2 gg)
αα₁ = αα₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα₁, αα₂: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hββ: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hβ ββ
p: αα₁ •• ββ = αα₂ •• ββ
q: transportf (λ x : f ==> g, ff ==>[ x] gg)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, α • h)
     (! vcomp_rinv Hβ) @ ! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1)
  (transportb (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
     (id2_right α) αα₁) =
transportf (λ x : f ==> g, ff ==>[ x] gg)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, α • h)
     (! vcomp_rinv Hβ) @ ! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1)
  (transportb (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
     (id2_right α) αα₂)
αα₁ = αα₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα₁, αα₂: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hββ: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hβ ββ
p: αα₁ •• ββ = αα₂ •• ββ
q: transportf (λ x : f ==> g, ff ==>[ x] gg)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, α • h)
     (! vcomp_rinv Hβ) @ ! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1)
  (transportf (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
     (! id2_right α) αα₁) =
transportf (λ x : f ==> g, ff ==>[ x] gg)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, α • h)
     (! vcomp_rinv Hβ) @ ! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1)
  (transportf (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
     (! id2_right α) αα₂)
αα₁ = αα₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα₁, αα₂: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hββ: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hβ ββ
p: αα₁ •• ββ = αα₂ •• ββ
q: transportf (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (! id2_right α @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, α • h)
     (! vcomp_rinv Hβ) @ ! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1) αα₁ =
transportf (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (! id2_right α @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, α • h)
     (! vcomp_rinv Hβ) @ ! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1) αα₂
αα₁ = αα₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα₁, αα₂: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hββ: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hβ ββ
p: αα₁ •• ββ = αα₂ •• ββ
q: transportf (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (! id2_right α @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, α • h)
     (! vcomp_rinv Hβ) @ ! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1) αα₁ =
transportf (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (! id2_right α @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, α • h)
     (! vcomp_rinv Hβ) @ ! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1) αα₂
q':= transportb_transpose_right q: αα₁ =
transportb (λ z : f ==> g, ff ==>[ z] gg)
  (! id2_right α @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, α • h)
     (! vcomp_rinv Hβ) @ ! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1)
  (transportf (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
     (! id2_right α @
      maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, α • h)
        (! vcomp_rinv Hβ) @ ! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1)
     αα₂)
αα₁ = αα₂

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
b₁, b₂: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
bb₁: D b₁
bb₂: D b₂
ff: bb₁ -->[ f] bb₂
gg: bb₁ -->[ g] bb₂
hh: bb₁ -->[ h] bb₂
αα₁, αα₂: ff ==>[ α] gg
ββ: gg ==>[ β] hh
Hββ: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hβ ββ
p: αα₁ •• ββ = αα₂ •• ββ
q: transportf (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (! id2_right α @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, α • h)
     (! vcomp_rinv Hβ) @ ! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1) αα₁ =
transportf (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (! id2_right α @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, α • h)
     (! vcomp_rinv Hβ) @ ! vassocl α β Hβ ^-1) αα₂
q': αα₁ = αα₂
αα₁ = αα₂

  exact q'.
Qed.


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
η: f ==> g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
ηη =
transportf (λ z : f ==> g, ff ==>[ z] gg) (id2_left η)
  (disp_id2 ff •• ηη)


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
η: f ==> g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
ηη =
transportf (λ z : f ==> g, ff ==>[ z] gg) (id2_left η)
  (disp_id2 ff •• ηη)

  exact (!(@transportf_transpose_left
             _
             (λ z, _ ==>[ z ] _)
             _ _
             _
             _ _
             (disp_id2_left ηη))).
Qed.


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportb
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (rwhisker_rwhisker_alt h g α)
  (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh •• (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh)) =
((αα ▹▹ gg) ▹▹ hh) •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportb
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (rwhisker_rwhisker_alt h g α)
  (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh •• (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh)) =
((αα ▹▹ gg) ▹▹ hh) •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
((αα ▹▹ gg) ▹▹ hh) •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh =
transportb
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (rwhisker_rwhisker_alt h g α)
  (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh •• (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (id2_left (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
  (disp_id2 (ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh)
   •• (((αα ▹▹ gg) ▹▹ hh)
       •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh)) =
transportb
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (rwhisker_rwhisker_alt h g α)
  (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh •• (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh))

D: disp_prebicat

f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (id2_left (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
  (disp_id2 (ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh)
   •• (((αα ▹▹ gg) ▹▹ hh)
       •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh)) = ?b
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
?b =
transportb
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (rwhisker_rwhisker_alt h g α)
  (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh •• (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh))

D: disp_prebicat

h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (id2_left (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
  (disp_id2 (ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh)
   •• (((αα ▹▹ gg) ▹▹ hh)
       •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh)) = ?b

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
disp_id2 (ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh)
•• (((αα ▹▹ gg) ▹▹ hh) •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh) =
?t2

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
disp_id2 (ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh) = ?y'

    exact (!(@transportf_transpose_left
               _
               (λ z, _ ==>[ z ] _)
               _ _
               _
               _ _
               (disp_rassociator_lassociator _ ff₁ gg hh))).
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (id2_left (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
  (transportf
     (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₁ · g · h,
      ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh)
     (rassociator_lassociator f₁ g h)
     (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh
      •• disp_lassociator ff₁ gg hh)
   •• (((αα ▹▹ gg) ▹▹ hh)
       •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh)) =
transportb
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (rwhisker_rwhisker_alt h g α)
  (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh •• (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (id2_left (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
  (transportf
     (λ x0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
      ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ x0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₁ · g · h,
         h0 • (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
        (rassociator_lassociator f₁ g h))
     ((disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh
       •• disp_lassociator ff₁ gg hh)
      •• (((αα ▹▹ gg) ▹▹ hh)
          •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh))) =
transportb
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (rwhisker_rwhisker_alt h g α)
  (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh •• (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ x0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ x0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₁ · g · h,
      h0 • (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
     (rassociator_lassociator f₁ g h) @
   id2_left (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
  ((disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh
    •• disp_lassociator ff₁ gg hh)
   •• (((αα ▹▹ gg) ▹▹ hh)
       •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh)) =
transportb
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (rwhisker_rwhisker_alt h g α)
  (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh •• (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ x0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ x0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₁ · g · h,
      h0 • (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
     (rassociator_lassociator f₁ g h) @
   id2_left (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
  (transportb
     (λ α : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
      ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
     (vassocl (rassociator f₁ g h)
        (lassociator f₁ g h)
        (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
     (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh
      •• (disp_lassociator ff₁ gg hh
          •• (((αα ▹▹ gg) ▹▹ hh)
              •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh)))) =
transportb
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (rwhisker_rwhisker_alt h g α)
  (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh •• (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ x0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ x0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₁ · g · h,
      h0 • (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
     (rassociator_lassociator f₁ g h) @
   id2_left (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
  (transportf
     (λ α : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
      ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
     (! vassocl (rassociator f₁ g h)
          (lassociator f₁ g h)
          (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
     (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh
      •• (disp_lassociator ff₁ gg hh
          •• (((αα ▹▹ gg) ▹▹ hh)
              •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh)))) =
transportf
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (! rwhisker_rwhisker_alt h g α)
  (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh •• (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh))

D: disp_prebicat

hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ α : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (! vassocl (rassociator f₁ g h) (lassociator f₁ g h)

     (rassociator_lassociator f₁ g h) @

   •• (disp_lassociator ff₁ gg hh

           •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh))) =
transportf
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (! rwhisker_rwhisker_alt h g α)
  (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh •• (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh))

   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (! vassocl (rassociator f₁ g h) (lassociator f₁ g h)

ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
?b =
transportf
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (! rwhisker_rwhisker_alt h g α)

C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ α : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (! vassocl (rassociator f₁ g h) (lassociator f₁ g h)
       (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₁ · g · h,
      h0 • (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
     (rassociator_lassociator f₁ g h) @
   id2_left (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
  (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh
   •• (disp_lassociator ff₁ gg hh
       •• (((αα ▹▹ gg) ▹▹ hh)
           •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh))) = ?b

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
disp_lassociator ff₁ gg hh
•• (((αα ▹▹ gg) ▹▹ hh) •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh) =
?t2

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportb
  (λ α : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (vassocr (lassociator f₁ g h) ((α ▹ g) ▹ h)
     (rassociator f₂ g h))
  ((disp_lassociator ff₁ gg hh •• ((αα ▹▹ gg) ▹▹ hh))
   •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh) = ?t2

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportb
  (λ α : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (vassocr (lassociator f₁ g h) ((α ▹ g) ▹ h)
     (rassociator f₂ g h))
  (transportb
     (λ α : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · g · h,
      ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; gg ;; hh)
     (rwhisker_rwhisker g h α)
     ((αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh) •• disp_lassociator ff₂ gg hh)
   •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh) = ?t2

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ α : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (! vassocr (lassociator f₁ g h) ((α ▹ g) ▹ h)
       (rassociator f₂ g h))
  (transportf
     (λ α : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · g · h,
      ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; gg ;; hh)
     (! rwhisker_rwhisker g h α)
     ((αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh) •• disp_lassociator ff₂ gg hh)
   •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh) = ?t2

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ α : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (! vassocr (lassociator f₁ g h) ((α ▹ g) ▹ h)
       (rassociator f₂ g h))
  (transportf
     (λ x0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
      ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ x0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · g · h,
         h0 • rassociator f₂ g h)
        (! rwhisker_rwhisker g h α))
     (((αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh) •• disp_lassociator ff₂ gg hh)
      •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh)) = ?t2

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ x0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ x0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · g · h,
      h0 • rassociator f₂ g h)
     (! rwhisker_rwhisker g h α) @
   ! vassocr (lassociator f₁ g h) ((α ▹ g) ▹ h)
       (rassociator f₂ g h))
  (((αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh) •• disp_lassociator ff₂ gg hh)
   •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh) = ?t2

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ x0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ x0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · g · h,
      h0 • rassociator f₂ g h)
     (! rwhisker_rwhisker g h α) @
   ! vassocr (lassociator f₁ g h) ((α ▹ g) ▹ h)
       (rassociator f₂ g h))
  (transportb
     (λ α : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
      ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
     (vassocl (α ▹ g · h) (lassociator f₂ g h)
        (rassociator f₂ g h))
     ((αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh)
      •• (disp_lassociator ff₂ gg hh
          •• disp_rassociator ff₂ gg hh))) = ?t2

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ x0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ x0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · g · h,
      h0 • rassociator f₂ g h)
     (! rwhisker_rwhisker g h α) @
   ! vassocr (lassociator f₁ g h) ((α ▹ g) ▹ h)
       (rassociator f₂ g h))
  (transportb
     (λ α : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
      ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
     (vassocl (α ▹ g · h) (lassociator f₂ g h)
        (rassociator f₂ g h))
     ((αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh)
      •• transportb
           (λ α : f₂ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
            ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[
            α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
           (lassociator_rassociator f₂ g h)
           (disp_id2 (ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))))) = ?t2

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ x0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ x0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · g · h,
      h0 • rassociator f₂ g h)
     (! rwhisker_rwhisker g h α) @
   ! vassocr (lassociator f₁ g h) ((α ▹ g) ▹ h)
       (rassociator f₂ g h))
  (transportf
     (λ α : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
      ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
     (! vassocl (α ▹ g · h) (lassociator f₂ g h)
          (rassociator f₂ g h))
     ((αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh)
      •• transportf
           (λ α : f₂ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
            ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[
            α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
           (! lassociator_rassociator f₂ g h)
           (disp_id2 (ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))))) = ?t2

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ x0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ x0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · g · h,
      h0 • rassociator f₂ g h)
     (! rwhisker_rwhisker g h α) @
   ! vassocr (lassociator f₁ g h) ((α ▹ g) ▹ h)
       (rassociator f₂ g h))
  (transportf
     (λ α : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
      ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
     (! vassocl (α ▹ g · h) (lassociator f₂ g h)
          (rassociator f₂ g h))
     (transportf
        (λ x0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
         ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ x0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
        (maponpaths
           (λ h0 : f₂ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
            (α ▹ g · h) • h0)
           (! lassociator_rassociator f₂ g h))
        ((αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh)
         •• disp_id2 (ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))))) = ?t2

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ x0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ x0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · g · h,
      h0 • rassociator f₂ g h)
     (! rwhisker_rwhisker g h α) @
   ! vassocr (lassociator f₁ g h) ((α ▹ g) ▹ h)
       (rassociator f₂ g h))
  (transportf
     (λ α : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
      ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
     (! vassocl (α ▹ g · h) (lassociator f₂ g h)
          (rassociator f₂ g h))
     (transportf
        (λ x0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
         ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ x0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
        (maponpaths
           (λ h0 : f₂ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
            (α ▹ g · h) • h0)
           (! lassociator_rassociator f₂ g h))
        (transportb
           (λ α : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
            ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[
            α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
           (id2_right (α ▹ g · h)) (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh)))) =
?t2

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ x0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ x0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · g · h,
      h0 • rassociator f₂ g h)
     (! rwhisker_rwhisker g h α) @
   ! vassocr (lassociator f₁ g h) ((α ▹ g) ▹ h)
       (rassociator f₂ g h))
  (transportf
     (λ α : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
      ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
     (! vassocl (α ▹ g · h) (lassociator f₂ g h)
          (rassociator f₂ g h))
     (transportf
        (λ x0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
         ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ x0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
        (maponpaths
           (λ h0 : f₂ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
            (α ▹ g · h) • h0)
           (! lassociator_rassociator f₂ g h))
        (transportf
           (λ α : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
            ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[
            α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
           (! id2_right (α ▹ g · h)) (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh)))) =
?t2

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ α : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (! id2_right (α ▹ g · h) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₂ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
      (α ▹ g · h) • h0)
     (! lassociator_rassociator f₂ g h) @
   ! vassocl (α ▹ g · h) (lassociator f₂ g h)
       (rassociator f₂ g h) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · g · h,
      h0 • rassociator f₂ g h)
     (! rwhisker_rwhisker g h α) @
   ! vassocr (lassociator f₁ g h) ((α ▹ g) ▹ h)
       (rassociator f₂ g h)) (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh) = ?t2

    apply idpath.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ α : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (! vassocl (rassociator f₁ g h) (lassociator f₁ g h)
       (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₁ · g · h,
      h0 • (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
     (rassociator_lassociator f₁ g h) @
   id2_left (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
  (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh
   •• transportf
        (λ α : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
         ff₁ ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
        (! id2_right (α ▹ g · h) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h0 : f₂ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
            (α ▹ g · h) • h0)
           (! lassociator_rassociator f₂ g h) @
         ! vassocl (α ▹ g · h) (lassociator f₂ g h)
             (rassociator f₂ g h) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · g · h,
            h0 • rassociator f₂ g h)
           (! rwhisker_rwhisker g h α) @
         ! vassocr (lassociator f₁ g h) ((α ▹ g) ▹ h)
             (rassociator f₂ g h)) (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh)) =
transportf
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (! rwhisker_rwhisker_alt h g α)
  (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh •• (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ α : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (! vassocl (rassociator f₁ g h) (lassociator f₁ g h)
       (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₁ · g · h,
      h0 • (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
     (rassociator_lassociator f₁ g h) @
   id2_left (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
  (transportf
     (λ x0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
      ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ x0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
         rassociator f₁ g h • h0)
        (! id2_right (α ▹ g · h) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h0 : f₂ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
            (α ▹ g · h) • h0)
           (! lassociator_rassociator f₂ g h) @
         ! vassocl (α ▹ g · h) (lassociator f₂ g h)
             (rassociator f₂ g h) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · g · h,
            h0 • rassociator f₂ g h)
           (! rwhisker_rwhisker g h α) @
         ! vassocr (lassociator f₁ g h) ((α ▹ g) ▹ h)
             (rassociator f₂ g h)))
     (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh •• (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh))) =
transportf
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (! rwhisker_rwhisker_alt h g α)
  (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh •• (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportf
  (λ x0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ x0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
      rassociator f₁ g h • h0)
     (! id2_right (α ▹ g · h) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h0 : f₂ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
         (α ▹ g · h) • h0)
        (! lassociator_rassociator f₂ g h) @
      ! vassocl (α ▹ g · h) (lassociator f₂ g h)
          (rassociator f₂ g h) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · g · h,
         h0 • rassociator f₂ g h)
        (! rwhisker_rwhisker g h α) @
      ! vassocr (lassociator f₁ g h) ((α ▹ g) ▹ h)
          (rassociator f₂ g h)) @
   ! vassocl (rassociator f₁ g h) (lassociator f₁ g h)
       (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₁ · g · h,
      h0 • (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
     (rassociator_lassociator f₁ g h) @
   id2_left (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
  (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh •• (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh)) =
transportf
  (λ z0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   ff₁ ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ z0] ff₂ ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (! rwhisker_rwhisker_alt h g α)
  (disp_rassociator ff₁ gg hh •• (αα ▹▹ gg ;; hh))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
w, x, y, z: C
f₁, f₂: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: ww -->[ f₁] xx
ff₂: ww -->[ f₂] xx
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
maponpaths
  (λ h0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
   rassociator f₁ g h • h0)
  (! id2_right (α ▹ g · h) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₂ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · (g · h),
      (α ▹ g · h) • h0)
     (! lassociator_rassociator f₂ g h) @
   ! vassocl (α ▹ g · h) (lassociator f₂ g h)
       (rassociator f₂ g h) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h0 : f₁ · (g · h) ==> f₂ · g · h,
      h0 • rassociator f₂ g h)
     (! rwhisker_rwhisker g h α) @
   ! vassocr (lassociator f₁ g h) ((α ▹ g) ▹ h)
       (rassociator f₂ g h)) @
! vassocl (rassociator f₁ g h) (lassociator f₁ g h)
    (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h) @
maponpaths
  (λ h0 : f₁ · g · h ==> f₁ · g · h,
   h0 • (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h))
  (rassociator_lassociator f₁ g h) @
id2_left (((α ▹ g) ▹ h) • rassociator f₂ g h) =
! rwhisker_rwhisker_alt h g α

  apply cellset_property.
Qed.


End Derived_Laws.

(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(** ** Total bicategory of a displayed bicategory                                      *)
(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)

Section total_prebicat.

Variable D : disp_prebicat.

Definition total_prebicat_1_data : precategory_data
  := total_category_ob_mor D ,, total_category_id_comp D.

Definition total_prebicat_cell_struct : prebicat_2cell_struct (total_category_ob_mor D)
  := λ a b f g, ∑ η : pr1 f ==> pr1 g, pr2 f ==>[η] pr2 g.

Definition total_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells : prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
  := (total_prebicat_1_data,, total_prebicat_cell_struct).


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
prebicat_2_id_comp_struct
  total_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
prebicat_2_id_comp_struct
  total_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b),
∑ η : pr1 f ==> pr1 f, pr2 f ==>[ η] pr2 f
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b),
∑
η : pr1
      (id₁ (pr1 a) · pr1 f,, id_disp (pr2 a) ;; pr2 f) ==>
    pr1 f,
pr2 (id₁ (pr1 a) · pr1 f,, id_disp (pr2 a) ;; pr2 f) ==>[
η] pr2 f
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b),
∑
η : pr1
      (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 b),, pr2 f ;; id_disp (pr2 b)) ==>
    pr1 f,
pr2 (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 b),, pr2 f ;; id_disp (pr2 b)) ==>[
η] pr2 f
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b),
∑
η : pr1 f ==>
    pr1
      (id₁ (pr1 a) · pr1 f,, id_disp (pr2 a) ;; pr2 f),
pr2 f ==>[
η] pr2
     (id₁ (pr1 a) · pr1 f,, id_disp (pr2 a) ;; pr2 f)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b),
∑
η : pr1 f ==>
    pr1
      (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 b),, pr2 f ;; id_disp (pr2 b)),
pr2 f ==>[
η] pr2
     (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 b),, pr2 f ;; id_disp (pr2 b))
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b c d : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b)
(g : ∑ f0 : C ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧, pr2 b -->[ f0] pr2 c)
(h : ∑ f0 : C ⟦ pr1 c, pr1 d ⟧, pr2 c -->[ f0] pr2 d),
∑
η : pr1
      (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g ;; pr2 h) ==>
    pr1
      (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h),,
       pr2 f ;; (pr2 g ;; pr2 h)),
pr2 (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g ;; pr2 h) ==>[
η] pr2
     (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h),,
      pr2 f ;; (pr2 g ;; pr2 h))
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b c d : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b)
(g : ∑ f0 : C ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧, pr2 b -->[ f0] pr2 c)
(h : ∑ f0 : C ⟦ pr1 c, pr1 d ⟧, pr2 c -->[ f0] pr2 d),
∑
η : pr1
      (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h),,
       pr2 f ;; (pr2 g ;; pr2 h)) ==>
    pr1
      (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g ;; pr2 h),
pr2
  (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h),, pr2 f ;; (pr2 g ;; pr2 h)) ==>[
η] pr2
     (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g ;; pr2 h)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b)
(g
 h : ∑ f0 : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f0] pr2 b),
(∑ η : pr1 f ==> pr1 g, pr2 f ==>[ η] pr2 g)
→ (∑ η : pr1 g ==> pr1 h, pr2 g ==>[ η] pr2 h)
  → ∑ η : pr1 f ==> pr1 h, pr2 f ==>[ η] pr2 h
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b c : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b)
(g1
 g2 : ∑ f0 : C ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧, pr2 b -->[ f0] pr2 c),
(∑ η : pr1 g1 ==> pr1 g2, pr2 g1 ==>[ η] pr2 g2)
→ ∑
  η : pr1 (pr1 f · pr1 g1,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g1) ==>
      pr1 (pr1 f · pr1 g2,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g2),
  pr2 (pr1 f · pr1 g1,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g1) ==>[
  η] pr2 (pr1 f · pr1 g2,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g2)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b c : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f1
 f2 : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b)
(g : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧, pr2 b -->[ f] pr2 c),
(∑ η : pr1 f1 ==> pr1 f2, pr2 f1 ==>[ η] pr2 f2)
→ ∑
  η : pr1 (pr1 f1 · pr1 g,, pr2 f1 ;; pr2 g) ==>
      pr1 (pr1 f2 · pr1 g,, pr2 f2 ;; pr2 g),
  pr2 (pr1 f1 · pr1 g,, pr2 f1 ;; pr2 g) ==>[
  η] pr2 (pr1 f2 · pr1 g,, pr2 f2 ;; pr2 g)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b),
∑ η : pr1 f ==> pr1 f, pr2 f ==>[ η] pr2 f
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
∑ η : pr1 f ==> pr1 f, pr2 f ==>[ η] pr2 f
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
pr2 f ==>[ id₂ (pr1 f)] pr2 f
 exact (disp_id2 _).
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b),
∑
η : pr1
      (id₁ (pr1 a) · pr1 f,, id_disp (pr2 a) ;; pr2 f) ==>
    pr1 f,
pr2 (id₁ (pr1 a) · pr1 f,, id_disp (pr2 a) ;; pr2 f) ==>[
η] pr2 f
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
∑
η : pr1
      (id₁ (pr1 a) · pr1 f,, id_disp (pr2 a) ;; pr2 f) ==>
    pr1 f,
pr2 (id₁ (pr1 a) · pr1 f,, id_disp (pr2 a) ;; pr2 f) ==>[
η] pr2 f
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
pr2 (id₁ (pr1 a) · pr1 f,, id_disp (pr2 a) ;; pr2 f) ==>[
lunitor (pr1 f)] pr2 f
 exact (disp_lunitor _).
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b),
∑
η : pr1
      (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 b),, pr2 f ;; id_disp (pr2 b)) ==>
    pr1 f,
pr2 (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 b),, pr2 f ;; id_disp (pr2 b)) ==>[
η] pr2 f
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
∑
η : pr1
      (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 b),, pr2 f ;; id_disp (pr2 b)) ==>
    pr1 f,
pr2 (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 b),, pr2 f ;; id_disp (pr2 b)) ==>[
η] pr2 f
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
pr2 (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 b),, pr2 f ;; id_disp (pr2 b)) ==>[
runitor (pr1 f)] pr2 f
 exact (disp_runitor _).
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b),
∑
η : pr1 f ==>
    pr1
      (id₁ (pr1 a) · pr1 f,, id_disp (pr2 a) ;; pr2 f),
pr2 f ==>[
η] pr2
     (id₁ (pr1 a) · pr1 f,, id_disp (pr2 a) ;; pr2 f)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
∑
η : pr1 f ==>
    pr1
      (id₁ (pr1 a) · pr1 f,, id_disp (pr2 a) ;; pr2 f),
pr2 f ==>[
η] pr2
     (id₁ (pr1 a) · pr1 f,, id_disp (pr2 a) ;; pr2 f)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
pr2 f ==>[
linvunitor (pr1 f)] pr2
                      (id₁ (pr1 a) · pr1 f,,
                       id_disp (pr2 a) ;; pr2 f)
 exact (disp_linvunitor _).
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b),
∑
η : pr1 f ==>
    pr1
      (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 b),, pr2 f ;; id_disp (pr2 b)),
pr2 f ==>[
η] pr2
     (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 b),, pr2 f ;; id_disp (pr2 b))
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
∑
η : pr1 f ==>
    pr1
      (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 b),, pr2 f ;; id_disp (pr2 b)),
pr2 f ==>[
η] pr2
     (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 b),, pr2 f ;; id_disp (pr2 b))
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
pr2 f ==>[
rinvunitor (pr1 f)] pr2
                      (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 b),,
                       pr2 f ;; id_disp (pr2 b))
 exact (disp_rinvunitor _).
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b c d : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b)
(g : ∑ f0 : C ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧, pr2 b -->[ f0] pr2 c)
(h : ∑ f0 : C ⟦ pr1 c, pr1 d ⟧, pr2 c -->[ f0] pr2 d),
∑
η : pr1
      (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g ;; pr2 h) ==>
    pr1
      (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h),,
       pr2 f ;; (pr2 g ;; pr2 h)),
pr2 (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g ;; pr2 h) ==>[
η] pr2
     (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h),,
      pr2 f ;; (pr2 g ;; pr2 h))
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: ∑ x : C, D x
f: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
g: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧, pr2 b -->[ f] pr2 c
h: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 c, pr1 d ⟧, pr2 c -->[ f] pr2 d
∑
η : pr1
      (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g ;; pr2 h) ==>
    pr1
      (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h),,
       pr2 f ;; (pr2 g ;; pr2 h)),
pr2 (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g ;; pr2 h) ==>[
η] pr2
     (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h),,
      pr2 f ;; (pr2 g ;; pr2 h))
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: ∑ x : C, D x
f: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
g: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧, pr2 b -->[ f] pr2 c
h: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 c, pr1 d ⟧, pr2 c -->[ f] pr2 d
pr2 (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g ;; pr2 h) ==>[
rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h)] pr2
                                       (pr1 f
                                        · (pr1 g
                                           · pr1 h),,
                                        pr2 f ;; (pr2
                                                 g ;; 
                                                 pr2 h))

    exact (disp_rassociator _ _ _).
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b c d : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b)
(g : ∑ f0 : C ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧, pr2 b -->[ f0] pr2 c)
(h : ∑ f0 : C ⟦ pr1 c, pr1 d ⟧, pr2 c -->[ f0] pr2 d),
∑
η : pr1
      (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h),,
       pr2 f ;; (pr2 g ;; pr2 h)) ==>
    pr1
      (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g ;; pr2 h),
pr2
  (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h),, pr2 f ;; (pr2 g ;; pr2 h)) ==>[
η] pr2
     (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g ;; pr2 h)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: ∑ x : C, D x
f: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
g: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧, pr2 b -->[ f] pr2 c
h: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 c, pr1 d ⟧, pr2 c -->[ f] pr2 d
∑
η : pr1
      (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h),,
       pr2 f ;; (pr2 g ;; pr2 h)) ==>
    pr1
      (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g ;; pr2 h),
pr2
  (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h),, pr2 f ;; (pr2 g ;; pr2 h)) ==>[
η] pr2
     (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g ;; pr2 h)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: ∑ x : C, D x
f: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
g: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧, pr2 b -->[ f] pr2 c
h: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 c, pr1 d ⟧, pr2 c -->[ f] pr2 d
pr2
  (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h),, pr2 f ;; (pr2 g ;; pr2 h)) ==>[
lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h)] pr2
                                       (pr1 f · pr1 g
                                        · pr1 h,,
                                        pr2 f ;; pr2 g ;; 
                                        pr2 h)

    exact (disp_lassociator _ _ _).
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b)
(g
 h : ∑ f0 : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f0] pr2 b),
(∑ η : pr1 f ==> pr1 g, pr2 f ==>[ η] pr2 g)
→ (∑ η : pr1 g ==> pr1 h, pr2 g ==>[ η] pr2 h)
  → ∑ η : pr1 f ==> pr1 h, pr2 f ==>[ η] pr2 h
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f, g, h: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
r: ∑ η : pr1 f ==> pr1 g, pr2 f ==>[ η] pr2 g
s: ∑ η : pr1 g ==> pr1 h, pr2 g ==>[ η] pr2 h
∑ η : pr1 f ==> pr1 h, pr2 f ==>[ η] pr2 h
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f, g, h: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
r: ∑ η : pr1 f ==> pr1 g, pr2 f ==>[ η] pr2 g
s: ∑ η : pr1 g ==> pr1 h, pr2 g ==>[ η] pr2 h
pr2 f ==>[ pr1 r • pr1 s] pr2 h

    exact (pr2 r •• pr2 s).
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b c : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b)
(g1
 g2 : ∑ f0 : C ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧, pr2 b -->[ f0] pr2 c),
(∑ η : pr1 g1 ==> pr1 g2, pr2 g1 ==>[ η] pr2 g2)
→ ∑
  η : pr1 (pr1 f · pr1 g1,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g1) ==>
      pr1 (pr1 f · pr1 g2,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g2),
  pr2 (pr1 f · pr1 g1,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g1) ==>[
  η] pr2 (pr1 f · pr1 g2,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g2)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, d: ∑ x : C, D x
f: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
g1, g2: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 d ⟧, pr2 b -->[ f] pr2 d
r: ∑ η : pr1 g1 ==> pr1 g2, pr2 g1 ==>[ η] pr2 g2
∑
η : pr1 (pr1 f · pr1 g1,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g1) ==>
    pr1 (pr1 f · pr1 g2,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g2),
pr2 (pr1 f · pr1 g1,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g1) ==>[
η] pr2 (pr1 f · pr1 g2,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g2)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, d: ∑ x : C, D x
f: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
g1, g2: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 d ⟧, pr2 b -->[ f] pr2 d
r: ∑ η : pr1 g1 ==> pr1 g2, pr2 g1 ==>[ η] pr2 g2
pr2 (pr1 f · pr1 g1,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g1) ==>[
pr1 f ◃ pr1 r] pr2 (pr1 f · pr1 g2,, pr2 f ;; pr2 g2)

    exact (pr2 f ◃◃ pr2 r).
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
∏ (a b c : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f1
 f2 : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b)
(g : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧, pr2 b -->[ f] pr2 c),
(∑ η : pr1 f1 ==> pr1 f2, pr2 f1 ==>[ η] pr2 f2)
→ ∑
  η : pr1 (pr1 f1 · pr1 g,, pr2 f1 ;; pr2 g) ==>
      pr1 (pr1 f2 · pr1 g,, pr2 f2 ;; pr2 g),
  pr2 (pr1 f1 · pr1 g,, pr2 f1 ;; pr2 g) ==>[
  η] pr2 (pr1 f2 · pr1 g,, pr2 f2 ;; pr2 g)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: ∑ x : C, D x
f1, f2: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
g: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧, pr2 b -->[ f] pr2 c
r: ∑ η : pr1 f1 ==> pr1 f2, pr2 f1 ==>[ η] pr2 f2
∑
η : pr1 (pr1 f1 · pr1 g,, pr2 f1 ;; pr2 g) ==>
    pr1 (pr1 f2 · pr1 g,, pr2 f2 ;; pr2 g),
pr2 (pr1 f1 · pr1 g,, pr2 f1 ;; pr2 g) ==>[
η] pr2 (pr1 f2 · pr1 g,, pr2 f2 ;; pr2 g)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: ∑ x : C, D x
f1, f2: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
g: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧, pr2 b -->[ f] pr2 c
r: ∑ η : pr1 f1 ==> pr1 f2, pr2 f1 ==>[ η] pr2 f2
pr2 (pr1 f1 · pr1 g,, pr2 f1 ;; pr2 g) ==>[
pr1 r ▹ pr1 g] pr2 (pr1 f2 · pr1 g,, pr2 f2 ;; pr2 g)

    exact (pr2 r ▹▹ pr2 g).
Defined.

Definition total_prebicat_data : prebicat_data
  := _ ,, total_prebicat_2_id_comp_struct.


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
prebicat_laws total_prebicat_data


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
prebicat_laws total_prebicat_data

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
id₂ f • x = x
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
x • id₂ g = x
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g, h, k: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
z: h ==> k
x • (y • z) = (x • y) • z
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
f ◃ id₂ g = id₂ (f · g)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
id₂ f ▹ g = id₂ (f · g)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g ==> h
y: h ==> i
(f ◃ x) • (f ◃ y) = f ◃ (x • y)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f, g, h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
(x ▹ i) • (y ▹ i) = (x • y) ▹ i
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
(id₁ a ◃ x) • lunitor g = lunitor f • x
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
(x ▹ id₁ b) • runitor g = runitor f • x
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
