f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
(f ◃ (g ◃ x)) • lassociator f g i =
lassociator f g h • (f · g ◃ x)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
(f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i =
lassociator f g i • ((f ◃ x) ▹ i)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: f ==> g
lassociator f h i • ((x ▹ h) ▹ i) =
(x ▹ h · i) • lassociator g h i
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: h ==> i
(x ▹ h) • (g ◃ y) = (f ◃ y) • (x ▹ i)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
lunitor f • linvunitor f = id₂ (id₁ a · f)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
linvunitor f • lunitor f = id₂ f
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
runitor f • rinvunitor f = id₂ (f · id₁ b)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
rinvunitor f • runitor f = id₂ f
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
lassociator f g h • rassociator f g h =
id₂ (f · (g · h))
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
rassociator f g h • lassociator f g h =
id₂ (f · g · h)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
lassociator f (id₁ b) g • (runitor f ▹ g) =
f ◃ lunitor g
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ d, e ⟧
((f ◃ lassociator g h i) • lassociator f (g · h) i)
• (lassociator f g h ▹ i) =
lassociator f g (h · i) • lassociator (f · g) h i

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
id₂ f • x = x
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr1 (id₂ f • x) = pr1 x
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr2 (id₂ f • x) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 f ==> pr1 g, pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 g) ?p
  (pr2 x)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr1 (id₂ f • x) = pr1 x
 apply id2_left.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr2 (id₂ f • x) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 f ==> pr1 g, pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 g)
  (id2_left (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)
 apply disp_id2_left.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
x • id₂ g = x
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr1 (x • id₂ g) = pr1 x
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr2 (x • id₂ g) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 f ==> pr1 g, pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 g) ?p
  (pr2 x)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr1 (x • id₂ g) = pr1 x
 apply id2_right.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr2 (x • id₂ g) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 f ==> pr1 g, pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 g)
  (id2_right (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)
 apply disp_id2_right.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g, h, k: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
z: h ==> k
x • (y • z) = (x • y) • z
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g, h, k: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
z: h ==> k
pr1 (x • (y • z)) = pr1 ((x • y) • z)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g, h, k: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
z: h ==> k
pr2 (x • (y • z)) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 f ==> pr1 k, pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 k) ?p
  (pr2 ((x • y) • z))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g, h, k: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
z: h ==> k
pr1 (x • (y • z)) = pr1 ((x • y) • z)
 apply vassocr.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g, h, k: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
z: h ==> k
pr2 (x • (y • z)) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 f ==> pr1 k, pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 k)
  (vassocr (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z))
  (pr2 ((x • y) • z))
 apply disp_vassocr.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
f ◃ id₂ g = id₂ (f · g)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr1 (f ◃ id₂ g) = pr1 (id₂ (f · g))
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr2 (f ◃ id₂ g) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · g) ==> pr1 (f · g),
   pr2 (f · g) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · g)) ?p
  (pr2 (id₂ (f · g)))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr1 (f ◃ id₂ g) = pr1 (id₂ (f · g))
 apply lwhisker_id2.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr2 (f ◃ id₂ g) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · g) ==> pr1 (f · g),
   pr2 (f · g) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · g))
  (lwhisker_id2 (pr1 f) (pr1 g)) (pr2 (id₂ (f · g)))
 apply disp_lwhisker_id2.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
id₂ f ▹ g = id₂ (f · g)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr1 (id₂ f ▹ g) = pr1 (id₂ (f · g))
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr2 (id₂ f ▹ g) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · g) ==> pr1 (f · g),
   pr2 (f · g) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · g)) ?p
  (pr2 (id₂ (f · g)))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr1 (id₂ f ▹ g) = pr1 (id₂ (f · g))
 apply id2_rwhisker.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr2 (id₂ f ▹ g) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · g) ==> pr1 (f · g),
   pr2 (f · g) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · g))
  (id2_rwhisker (pr1 f) (pr1 g)) (pr2 (id₂ (f · g)))
 apply disp_id2_rwhisker.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g ==> h
y: h ==> i
(f ◃ x) • (f ◃ y) = f ◃ (x • y)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g ==> h
y: h ==> i
pr1 ((f ◃ x) • (f ◃ y)) = pr1 (f ◃ (x • y))
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g ==> h
y: h ==> i
pr2 ((f ◃ x) • (f ◃ y)) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · g) ==> pr1 (f · i),
   pr2 (f · g) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · i)) ?p
  (pr2 (f ◃ (x • y)))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g ==> h
y: h ==> i
pr1 ((f ◃ x) • (f ◃ y)) = pr1 (f ◃ (x • y))
 apply lwhisker_vcomp.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g ==> h
y: h ==> i
pr2 ((f ◃ x) • (f ◃ y)) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · g) ==> pr1 (f · i),
   pr2 (f · g) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · i))
  (lwhisker_vcomp (pr1 f) (pr1 x) (pr1 y))
  (pr2 (f ◃ (x • y)))
 apply disp_lwhisker_vcomp.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f, g, h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
(x ▹ i) • (y ▹ i) = (x • y) ▹ i
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f, g, h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
pr1 ((x ▹ i) • (y ▹ i)) = pr1 ((x • y) ▹ i)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f, g, h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
pr2 ((x ▹ i) • (y ▹ i)) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · i) ==> pr1 (h · i),
   pr2 (f · i) ==>[ x] pr2 (h · i)) ?p
  (pr2 ((x • y) ▹ i))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f, g, h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
pr1 ((x ▹ i) • (y ▹ i)) = pr1 ((x • y) ▹ i)
 apply rwhisker_vcomp.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f, g, h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
pr2 ((x ▹ i) • (y ▹ i)) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · i) ==> pr1 (h · i),
   pr2 (f · i) ==>[ x] pr2 (h · i))
  (rwhisker_vcomp (pr1 i) (pr1 x) (pr1 y))
  (pr2 ((x • y) ▹ i))
 apply disp_rwhisker_vcomp.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
(id₁ a ◃ x) • lunitor g = lunitor f • x
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr1 ((id₁ a ◃ x) • lunitor g) = pr1 (lunitor f • x)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr2 ((id₁ a ◃ x) • lunitor g) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (id₁ a · f) ==> pr1 g,
   pr2 (id₁ a · f) ==>[ x] pr2 g) ?p
  (pr2 (lunitor f • x))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr1 ((id₁ a ◃ x) • lunitor g) = pr1 (lunitor f • x)
 apply vcomp_lunitor.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr2 ((id₁ a ◃ x) • lunitor g) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (id₁ a · f) ==> pr1 g,
   pr2 (id₁ a · f) ==>[ x] pr2 g)
  (vcomp_lunitor (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 x))
  (pr2 (lunitor f • x))
 apply disp_vcomp_lunitor.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
(x ▹ id₁ b) • runitor g = runitor f • x
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr1 ((x ▹ id₁ b) • runitor g) = pr1 (runitor f • x)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr2 ((x ▹ id₁ b) • runitor g) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · id₁ b) ==> pr1 g,
   pr2 (f · id₁ b) ==>[ x] pr2 g) ?p
  (pr2 (runitor f • x))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr1 ((x ▹ id₁ b) • runitor g) = pr1 (runitor f • x)
 apply vcomp_runitor.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr2 ((x ▹ id₁ b) • runitor g) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · id₁ b) ==> pr1 g,
   pr2 (f · id₁ b) ==>[ x] pr2 g)
  (vcomp_runitor (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 x))
  (pr2 (runitor f • x))
 apply disp_vcomp_runitor.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
(f ◃ (g ◃ x)) • lassociator f g i =
lassociator f g h • (f · g ◃ x)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
pr1 ((f ◃ (g ◃ x)) • lassociator f g i) =
pr1 (lassociator f g h • (f · g ◃ x))
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
pr2 ((f ◃ (g ◃ x)) • lassociator f g i) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · (g · h)) ==> pr1 (f · g · i),
   pr2 (f · (g · h)) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · g · i)) ?p
  (pr2 (lassociator f g h • (f · g ◃ x)))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
pr1 ((f ◃ (g ◃ x)) • lassociator f g i) =
pr1 (lassociator f g h • (f · g ◃ x))
 apply lwhisker_lwhisker.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
pr2 ((f ◃ (g ◃ x)) • lassociator f g i) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · (g · h)) ==> pr1 (f · g · i),
   pr2 (f · (g · h)) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · g · i))
  (lwhisker_lwhisker (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 x))
  (pr2 (lassociator f g h • (f · g ◃ x)))
 apply disp_lwhisker_lwhisker.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
(f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i =
lassociator f g i • ((f ◃ x) ▹ i)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
pr1 ((f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i) =
pr1 (lassociator f g i • ((f ◃ x) ▹ i))
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
pr2 ((f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · (g · i)) ==> pr1 (f · h · i),
   pr2 (f · (g · i)) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · h · i)) ?p
  (pr2 (lassociator f g i • ((f ◃ x) ▹ i)))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
pr1 ((f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i) =
pr1 (lassociator f g i • ((f ◃ x) ▹ i))
 apply rwhisker_lwhisker.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
pr2 ((f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · (g · i)) ==> pr1 (f · h · i),
   pr2 (f · (g · i)) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · h · i))
  (rwhisker_lwhisker (pr1 f) (pr1 i) (pr1 x))
  (pr2 (lassociator f g i • ((f ◃ x) ▹ i)))
 apply disp_rwhisker_lwhisker.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: f ==> g
lassociator f h i • ((x ▹ h) ▹ i) =
(x ▹ h · i) • lassociator g h i
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr1 (lassociator f h i • ((x ▹ h) ▹ i)) =
pr1 ((x ▹ h · i) • lassociator g h i)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr2 (lassociator f h i • ((x ▹ h) ▹ i)) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · (h · i)) ==> pr1 (g · h · i),
   pr2 (f · (h · i)) ==>[ x] pr2 (g · h · i)) ?p
  (pr2 ((x ▹ h · i) • lassociator g h i))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr1 (lassociator f h i • ((x ▹ h) ▹ i)) =
pr1 ((x ▹ h · i) • lassociator g h i)
 apply rwhisker_rwhisker.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: f ==> g
pr2 (lassociator f h i • ((x ▹ h) ▹ i)) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · (h · i)) ==> pr1 (g · h · i),
   pr2 (f · (h · i)) ==>[ x] pr2 (g · h · i))
  (rwhisker_rwhisker (pr1 h) (pr1 i) (pr1 x))
  (pr2 ((x ▹ h · i) • lassociator g h i))
 apply disp_rwhisker_rwhisker.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: h ==> i
(x ▹ h) • (g ◃ y) = (f ◃ y) • (x ▹ i)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: h ==> i
pr1 ((x ▹ h) • (g ◃ y)) = pr1 ((f ◃ y) • (x ▹ i))
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: h ==> i
pr2 ((x ▹ h) • (g ◃ y)) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · h) ==> pr1 (g · i),
   pr2 (f · h) ==>[ x] pr2 (g · i)) ?p
  (pr2 ((f ◃ y) • (x ▹ i)))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: h ==> i
pr1 ((x ▹ h) • (g ◃ y)) = pr1 ((f ◃ y) • (x ▹ i))
 apply vcomp_whisker.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f, g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: h ==> i
pr2 ((x ▹ h) • (g ◃ y)) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · h) ==> pr1 (g · i),
   pr2 (f · h) ==>[ x] pr2 (g · i))
  (vcomp_whisker (pr1 x) (pr1 y))
  (pr2 ((f ◃ y) • (x ▹ i)))
 apply disp_vcomp_whisker.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
lunitor f • linvunitor f = id₂ (id₁ a · f)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr1 (lunitor f • linvunitor f) = pr1 (id₂ (id₁ a · f))
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr2 (lunitor f • linvunitor f) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (id₁ a · f) ==> pr1 (id₁ a · f),
   pr2 (id₁ a · f) ==>[ x] pr2 (id₁ a · f)) ?p
  (pr2 (id₂ (id₁ a · f)))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr1 (lunitor f • linvunitor f) = pr1 (id₂ (id₁ a · f))
 apply lunitor_linvunitor.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr2 (lunitor f • linvunitor f) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (id₁ a · f) ==> pr1 (id₁ a · f),
   pr2 (id₁ a · f) ==>[ x] pr2 (id₁ a · f))
  (lunitor_linvunitor (pr1 f)) (pr2 (id₂ (id₁ a · f)))
 apply disp_lunitor_linvunitor.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
linvunitor f • lunitor f = id₂ f
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr1 (linvunitor f • lunitor f) = pr1 (id₂ f)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr2 (linvunitor f • lunitor f) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 f ==> pr1 f, pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 f) ?p
  (pr2 (id₂ f))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr1 (linvunitor f • lunitor f) = pr1 (id₂ f)
 apply linvunitor_lunitor.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr2 (linvunitor f • lunitor f) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 f ==> pr1 f, pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 f)
  (linvunitor_lunitor (pr1 f)) (pr2 (id₂ f))
 apply disp_linvunitor_lunitor.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
runitor f • rinvunitor f = id₂ (f · id₁ b)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr1 (runitor f • rinvunitor f) = pr1 (id₂ (f · id₁ b))
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr2 (runitor f • rinvunitor f) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · id₁ b) ==> pr1 (f · id₁ b),
   pr2 (f · id₁ b) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · id₁ b)) ?p
  (pr2 (id₂ (f · id₁ b)))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr1 (runitor f • rinvunitor f) = pr1 (id₂ (f · id₁ b))
 apply runitor_rinvunitor.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr2 (runitor f • rinvunitor f) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · id₁ b) ==> pr1 (f · id₁ b),
   pr2 (f · id₁ b) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · id₁ b))
  (runitor_rinvunitor (pr1 f)) (pr2 (id₂ (f · id₁ b)))
 apply disp_runitor_rinvunitor.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
rinvunitor f • runitor f = id₂ f
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr1 (rinvunitor f • runitor f) = pr1 (id₂ f)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr2 (rinvunitor f • runitor f) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 f ==> pr1 f, pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 f) ?p
  (pr2 (id₂ f))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr1 (rinvunitor f • runitor f) = pr1 (id₂ f)
 apply rinvunitor_runitor.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr2 (rinvunitor f • runitor f) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 f ==> pr1 f, pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 f)
  (rinvunitor_runitor (pr1 f)) (pr2 (id₂ f))
 apply disp_rinvunitor_runitor.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
lassociator f g h • rassociator f g h =
id₂ (f · (g · h))
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
pr1 (lassociator f g h • rassociator f g h) =
pr1 (id₂ (f · (g · h)))
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
pr2 (lassociator f g h • rassociator f g h) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · (g · h)) ==> pr1 (f · (g · h)),
   pr2 (f · (g · h)) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · (g · h))) ?p
  (pr2 (id₂ (f · (g · h))))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
pr1 (lassociator f g h • rassociator f g h) =
pr1 (id₂ (f · (g · h)))
 apply lassociator_rassociator.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
pr2 (lassociator f g h • rassociator f g h) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · (g · h)) ==> pr1 (f · (g · h)),
   pr2 (f · (g · h)) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · (g · h)))
  (lassociator_rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h))
  (pr2 (id₂ (f · (g · h))))
 apply disp_lassociator_rassociator.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
rassociator f g h • lassociator f g h =
id₂ (f · g · h)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
pr1 (rassociator f g h • lassociator f g h) =
pr1 (id₂ (f · g · h))
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
pr2 (rassociator f g h • lassociator f g h) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · g · h) ==> pr1 (f · g · h),
   pr2 (f · g · h) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · g · h)) ?p
  (pr2 (id₂ (f · g · h)))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
pr1 (rassociator f g h • lassociator f g h) =
pr1 (id₂ (f · g · h))
 apply rassociator_lassociator.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
pr2 (rassociator f g h • lassociator f g h) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · g · h) ==> pr1 (f · g · h),
   pr2 (f · g · h) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · g · h))
  (rassociator_lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h))
  (pr2 (id₂ (f · g · h)))
 apply disp_rassociator_lassociator.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
lassociator f (id₁ b) g • (runitor f ▹ g) =
f ◃ lunitor g
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr1 (lassociator f (id₁ b) g • (runitor f ▹ g)) =
pr1 (f ◃ lunitor g)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr2 (lassociator f (id₁ b) g • (runitor f ▹ g)) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · (id₁ b · g)) ==> pr1 (f · g),
   pr2 (f · (id₁ b · g)) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · g)) ?p
  (pr2 (f ◃ lunitor g))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr1 (lassociator f (id₁ b) g • (runitor f ▹ g)) =
pr1 (f ◃ lunitor g)
 apply runitor_rwhisker.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr2 (lassociator f (id₁ b) g • (runitor f ▹ g)) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · (id₁ b · g)) ==> pr1 (f · g),
   pr2 (f · (id₁ b · g)) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · g))
  (runitor_rwhisker (pr1 f) (pr1 g))
  (pr2 (f ◃ lunitor g))
 apply disp_runitor_rwhisker.
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ d, e ⟧
((f ◃ lassociator g h i) • lassociator f (g · h) i)
• (lassociator f g h ▹ i) =
lassociator f g (h · i) • lassociator (f · g) h i
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ d, e ⟧
pr1
  (((f ◃ lassociator g h i) • lassociator f (g · h) i)
   • (lassociator f g h ▹ i)) =
pr1
  (lassociator f g (h · i) • lassociator (f · g) h i)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ d, e ⟧
pr2
  (((f ◃ lassociator g h i) • lassociator f (g · h) i)
   • (lassociator f g h ▹ i)) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · (g · (h · i))) ==>
         pr1 (f · g · h · i),
   pr2 (f · (g · (h · i))) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · g · h · i))
  ?p
  (pr2
     (lassociator f g (h · i)
      • lassociator (f · g) h i))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ d, e ⟧
pr1
  (((f ◃ lassociator g h i) • lassociator f (g · h) i)
   • (lassociator f g h ▹ i)) =
pr1
  (lassociator f g (h · i) • lassociator (f · g) h i)
 apply lassociator_lassociator.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: total_prebicat_data
f: total_prebicat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: total_prebicat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: total_prebicat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: total_prebicat_data ⟦ d, e ⟧
pr2
  (((f ◃ lassociator g h i) • lassociator f (g · h) i)
   • (lassociator f g h ▹ i)) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (f · (g · (h · i))) ==>
         pr1 (f · g · h · i),
   pr2 (f · (g · (h · i))) ==>[ x] pr2 (f · g · h · i))
  (lassociator_lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h)
     (pr1 i))
  (pr2
     (lassociator f g (h · i)
      • lassociator (f · g) h i))
 apply disp_lassociator_lassociator.
Defined.

Definition total_prebicat : prebicat := _ ,, total_prebicat_laws.
End total_prebicat.

Definition has_disp_cellset (D : disp_prebicat) : UU
  := ∏ (a b : C) (f g : C⟦a,b⟧) (x : f ==> g)
       (aa : D a) (bb : D b)
       (ff : aa -->[f] bb)
       (gg : aa -->[g] bb),
     isaset (ff ==>[x] gg).

Definition disp_bicat : UU
  := ∑ D : disp_prebicat, has_disp_cellset D.

Coercion disp_prebicat_of_disp_bicat (D : disp_bicat)
  : disp_prebicat
  := pr1 D.

Definition disp_cellset_property (D : disp_bicat)
  : has_disp_cellset D
  := pr2 D.


C: bicat
D: disp_bicat
isaset_cells (total_prebicat D)


C: bicat
D: disp_bicat
isaset_cells (total_prebicat D)


C: bicat
D: disp_bicat
∏ (a b : total_prebicat D)
(f g : total_prebicat D ⟦ a, b ⟧), isaset (f ==> g)


C: bicat
D: disp_bicat
∏ (a b : ∑ x : C, D x)
(f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b)
(g : ∑ f0 : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f0] pr2 b),
isaset (total_prebicat_cell_struct D a b f g)


C: bicat
D: disp_bicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f, g: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
isaset (total_prebicat_cell_struct D a b f g)


C: bicat
D: disp_bicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f, g: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
isaset (∑ η : pr1 f ==> pr1 g, pr2 f ==>[ η] pr2 g)


C: bicat
D: disp_bicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f, g: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
isaset (pr1 f ==> pr1 g)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f, g: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
∏ x : pr1 f ==> pr1 g, isaset (pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 g)


C: bicat
D: disp_bicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f, g: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
isaset (pr1 f ==> pr1 g)
 apply cellset_property.

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f, g: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
∏ x : pr1 f ==> pr1 g, isaset (pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 g)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat
a, b: ∑ x : C, D x
f, g: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
x: pr1 f ==> pr1 g
isaset (pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 g)

  apply disp_cellset_property.
Qed.

Definition total_bicat (D : disp_bicat) : bicat
  := total_prebicat D,, isaset_cells_total_prebicat D.

End disp_prebicat.

Arguments disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells _ : clear implicits.
Arguments disp_prebicat_data _ : clear implicits.
Arguments disp_prebicat _ : clear implicits.
Arguments disp_bicat _ : clear implicits.

(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(** ** Displayed left and right unitors coincide on the identity                       *)
(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)


C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
disp_lunitor (id_disp aa) =
cell_transportb (lunitor_runitor_identity a)
  (disp_runitor (id_disp aa))


C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
disp_lunitor (id_disp aa) =
cell_transportb (lunitor_runitor_identity a)
  (disp_runitor (id_disp aa))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
TT:= fiber_paths (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)): transportf
  (λ x : pr1 (id₁ (a,, aa) · id₁ (a,, aa)) ==>
         pr1 (id₁ (a,, aa)),
   (λ η : pr1 (id₁ (a,, aa) · id₁ (a,, aa)) ==>
          pr1 (id₁ (a,, aa)),
    disp_2cells η
      (pr2 (id₁ (a,, aa) · id₁ (a,, aa)))
      (pr2 (id₁ (a,, aa)))) x)
  (base_paths (lunitor (id₁ (a,, aa)))
     (runitor (id₁ (a,, aa)))
     (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)))
  (pr2 (lunitor (id₁ (a,, aa)))) =
pr2 (runitor (id₁ (a,, aa)))
disp_lunitor (id_disp aa) =
cell_transportb (lunitor_runitor_identity a)
  (disp_runitor (id_disp aa))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
TT:= fiber_paths (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)): transportf
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa))
  (base_paths
     (lunitor (id₁ a),, disp_lunitor (id_disp aa))
     (runitor (id₁ a),, disp_runitor (id_disp aa))
     (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)))
  (disp_lunitor (id_disp aa)) =
disp_runitor (id_disp aa)
disp_lunitor (id_disp aa) =
cell_transportb (lunitor_runitor_identity a)
  (disp_runitor (id_disp aa))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
TT:= fiber_paths (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)): transportf
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa))
  (base_paths
     (lunitor (id₁ a),, disp_lunitor (id_disp aa))
     (runitor (id₁ a),, disp_runitor (id_disp aa))
     (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)))
  (disp_lunitor (id_disp aa)) =
disp_runitor (id_disp aa)
cell_transportf (lunitor_runitor_identity a)
  (disp_lunitor (id_disp aa)) =
disp_runitor (id_disp aa)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
TT:= fiber_paths (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)): transportf
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa))
  (base_paths
     (lunitor (id₁ a),, disp_lunitor (id_disp aa))
     (runitor (id₁ a),, disp_runitor (id_disp aa))
     (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)))
  (disp_lunitor (id_disp aa)) =
disp_runitor (id_disp aa)
cell_transportf (lunitor_runitor_identity a)
  (disp_lunitor (id_disp aa)) = ?b
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
TT:= fiber_paths (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)): transportf
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa))
  (base_paths
     (lunitor (id₁ a),, disp_lunitor (id_disp aa))
     (runitor (id₁ a),, disp_runitor (id_disp aa))
     (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)))
  (disp_lunitor (id_disp aa)) =
disp_runitor (id_disp aa)
?b = disp_runitor (id_disp aa)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
TT:= fiber_paths (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)): transportf
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa))
  (base_paths
     (lunitor (id₁ a),, disp_lunitor (id_disp aa))
     (runitor (id₁ a),, disp_runitor (id_disp aa))
     (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)))
  (disp_lunitor (id_disp aa)) =
disp_runitor (id_disp aa)
cell_transportf (lunitor_runitor_identity a)
  (disp_lunitor (id_disp aa)) =
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa))
  (base_paths
     (lunitor (id₁ a),, disp_lunitor (id_disp aa))
     (runitor (id₁ a),, disp_runitor (id_disp aa))
     (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)))
  (disp_lunitor (id_disp aa))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
TT:= fiber_paths (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)): transportf
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa))
  (base_paths
     (lunitor (id₁ a),, disp_lunitor (id_disp aa))
     (runitor (id₁ a),, disp_runitor (id_disp aa))
     (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)))
  (disp_lunitor (id_disp aa)) =
disp_runitor (id_disp aa)
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa)) (lunitor_runitor_identity a)
  (disp_lunitor (id_disp aa)) =
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa))
  (base_paths
     (lunitor (id₁ a),, disp_lunitor (id_disp aa))
     (runitor (id₁ a),, disp_runitor (id_disp aa))
     (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)))
  (disp_lunitor (id_disp aa))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
TT:= fiber_paths (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)): transportf
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa))
  (base_paths
     (lunitor (id₁ a),, disp_lunitor (id_disp aa))
     (runitor (id₁ a),, disp_runitor (id_disp aa))
     (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa)))
  (disp_lunitor (id_disp aa)) =
disp_runitor (id_disp aa)
lunitor_runitor_identity a =
base_paths
  (lunitor (id₁ a),, disp_lunitor (id_disp aa))
  (runitor (id₁ a),, disp_runitor (id_disp aa))
  (lunitor_runitor_identity (a,, aa))

  apply cellset_property.
Qed.


C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
disp_runitor (id_disp aa) =
transportb
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa)) (runitor_lunitor_identity a)
  (disp_lunitor (id_disp aa))


C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
disp_runitor (id_disp aa) =
transportb
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa)) (runitor_lunitor_identity a)
  (disp_lunitor (id_disp aa))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
transportb
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa)) (! runitor_lunitor_identity a)
  (disp_runitor (id_disp aa)) =
disp_lunitor (id_disp aa)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
disp_lunitor (id_disp aa) =
transportb
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa)) (! runitor_lunitor_identity a)
  (disp_runitor (id_disp aa))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
disp_lunitor (id_disp aa) = ?b
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
?b =
transportb
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa)) (! runitor_lunitor_identity a)
  (disp_runitor (id_disp aa))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
cell_transportb (lunitor_runitor_identity a)
  (disp_runitor (id_disp aa)) =
transportb
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa)) (! runitor_lunitor_identity a)
  (disp_runitor (id_disp aa))

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a: C
aa: D a
transportb
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa)) (lunitor_runitor_identity a)
  (disp_runitor (id_disp aa)) =
transportb
  (λ x : id₁ a · id₁ a ==> id₁ a,
   disp_2cells x (id_disp aa ;; id_disp aa)
     (id_disp aa)) (! runitor_lunitor_identity a)
  (disp_runitor (id_disp aa))

  apply maponpaths_2, cellset_property.
Qed.



B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_0 B
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
adjoint_equivalence a b
→ ∏ aa : D a,
  ∑ bb : D b, adjoint_equivalence (a,, aa) (b,, bb)


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_0 B
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
adjoint_equivalence a b
→ ∏ aa : D a,
  ∑ bb : D b, adjoint_equivalence (a,, aa) (b,, bb)

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_0 B
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
∏ a : B,
(λ (a0 b : B) (_ : adjoint_equivalence a0 b),
 ∏ aa : D a0,
 ∑ bb : D b, adjoint_equivalence (a0,, aa) (b,, bb)) a
  a (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_0 B
D: disp_bicat B
a, b, c: B
aa: D c
∑ bb : D c, adjoint_equivalence (c,, aa) (c,, bb)

  exact (aa ,, internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity _).
Defined.

(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(** ** Useful properties                                                               *)
(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)

Definition disp_2cells_isaprop
           {B : bicat} (D : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells B)
  := ∏ (a b : B) (f g : a --> b) (x : f ==> g)
       (aa : D a) (bb : D b) (ff : aa -->[f] bb) (gg : aa -->[g] bb),
    isaprop (disp_2cells x ff gg).

Definition disp_2cells_iscontr
           {B : bicat} (D : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells B)
  := ∏ (a b : B) (f g : a --> b) (x : f ==> g)
       (aa : D a) (bb : D b) (ff : aa -->[f] bb) (gg : aa -->[g] bb),
     iscontr (disp_2cells x ff gg).

Definition disp_locally_groupoid
           {B : bicat} (D : disp_bicat B)
  := ∏ (a b : B) (f g : a --> b) (x : invertible_2cell f g)
       (aa : D a) (bb : D b) (ff : aa -->[f] bb) (gg : aa -->[g] bb)
       (xx : disp_2cells x ff gg), is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx.

Definition disp_locally_sym
           {B : bicat} (D : disp_bicat B)
  := ∏ (a b : B) (f g : a --> b) (x : invertible_2cell f g)
       (aa : D a) (bb : D b) (ff : aa -->[f] bb) (gg : aa -->[g] bb)
       (xx : disp_2cells x ff gg), disp_2cells x^-1 gg ff.


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
H: disp_locally_sym D
HD: disp_2cells_isaprop D
disp_locally_groupoid D


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
H: disp_locally_sym D
HD: disp_2cells_isaprop D
disp_locally_groupoid D

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
H: disp_locally_sym D
HD: disp_2cells_isaprop D
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: disp_2cells x ff gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
H: disp_locally_sym D
HD: disp_2cells_isaprop D
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: disp_2cells x ff gg
disp_2cells x ^-1 gg ff
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
H: disp_locally_sym D
HD: disp_2cells_isaprop D
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: disp_2cells x ff gg
(λ y : disp_2cells x ^-1 gg ff,
 disp_vcomp2 xx y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, disp_2cells α ff ff)
   (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)
 × disp_vcomp2 y xx =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, disp_2cells α gg gg)
     (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg)) ?pr1

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
H: disp_locally_sym D
HD: disp_2cells_isaprop D
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: disp_2cells x ff gg
disp_2cells x ^-1 gg ff
 
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
H: disp_locally_sym D
HD: disp_2cells_isaprop D
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: disp_2cells x ff gg
disp_2cells x ff gg

    exact xx.
  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
H: disp_locally_sym D
HD: disp_2cells_isaprop D
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: disp_2cells x ff gg
(λ y : disp_2cells x ^-1 gg ff,
 disp_vcomp2 xx y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, disp_2cells α ff ff)
   (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)
 × disp_vcomp2 y xx =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, disp_2cells α gg gg)
     (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg))
  (H a b f g x aa bb ff gg xx)
 split; apply HD.
Defined.

Definition disp_locally_groupoid_over_id
           {B : bicat} (D : disp_bicat B)
  : UU
  := ∏ (a b : B)
       (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (aa : D a)
       (bb : D b)
       (ff gg : aa -->[ f] bb)
       (xx : disp_2cells (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff gg),
     is_disp_invertible_2cell (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f) xx.


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HD: disp_locally_groupoid_over_id D
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
disp_locally_groupoid D


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HD: disp_locally_groupoid_over_id D
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
disp_locally_groupoid D

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HD: disp_locally_groupoid_over_id D
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
(λ (a0 b0 : B) (f0 g : B ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧)
 (α : invertible_2cell f0 g),
 ∏ (aa : D a0) (bb : D b0) (ff : aa -->[ f0] bb)
 (gg : aa -->[ g] bb) (xx : disp_2cells α ff gg),
 is_disp_invertible_2cell α xx) a b f f
  (id2_invertible_2cell f)

  exact HD.
Defined.


B: bicat
D: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells B
disp_2cells_iscontr D → disp_2cells_isaprop D


B: bicat
D: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells B
disp_2cells_iscontr D → disp_2cells_isaprop D

  
B: bicat
D: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells B
c: disp_2cells_iscontr D
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isaprop (disp_2cells x ff gg)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells B
c: disp_2cells_iscontr D
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
iscontr (disp_2cells x ff gg)

  apply c.
Qed.


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
disp_2cells_iscontr D → disp_locally_groupoid D


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
disp_2cells_iscontr D → disp_locally_groupoid D

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
c: disp_2cells_iscontr D
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: disp_2cells x ff gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
c: disp_2cells_iscontr D
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: disp_2cells x ff gg
disp_2cells x ^-1 gg ff
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
c: disp_2cells_iscontr D
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: disp_2cells x ff gg
(λ y : disp_2cells x ^-1 gg ff,
 disp_vcomp2 xx y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, disp_2cells α ff ff)
   (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)
 × disp_vcomp2 y xx =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, disp_2cells α gg gg)
     (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg)) ?pr1

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
c: disp_2cells_iscontr D
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: disp_2cells x ff gg
disp_2cells x ^-1 gg ff
 apply c.
  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
c: disp_2cells_iscontr D
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: disp_2cells x ff gg
(λ y : disp_2cells x ^-1 gg ff,
 disp_vcomp2 xx y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, disp_2cells α ff ff)
   (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)
 × disp_vcomp2 y xx =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, disp_2cells α gg gg)
     (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg))
  (let X :=
     λ (a b : B) (f g : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
     (aa : D a) (bb : D b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
     (gg : aa -->[ g] bb),
     pr1 (c a b f g x aa bb ff gg) in
   X a b g f x ^-1 aa bb gg ff)
 split; apply isapropifcontr, c.
Qed.

Section HomDisplayedCategory.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {D : disp_bicat B}.

  Notation "f' ==>[ x ] g'" := (disp_2cells x f' g') (at level 60).
  Notation "rr •• ss" := (disp_vcomp2 rr ss) (at level 60).

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat_ob_mor (hom x y)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat_ob_mor (hom x y)

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
hom x y → UU
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
(λ obd : hom x y → UU,
 ∏ x0 y0 : hom x y,
 obd x0 → obd y0 → hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧ → UU) ?pr1

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
hom x y → UU
 exact (λ f, xx -->[ f ] yy).
    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
(λ obd : hom x y → UU,
 ∏ x0 y0 : hom x y,
 obd x0 → obd y0 → hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧ → UU)
  (λ f : hom x y, xx -->[ f] yy)
 exact (λ f g ff gg α, ff ==>[ α ] gg).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat_id_comp (hom x y) (disp_hom_ob_mor xx yy)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat_id_comp (hom x y) (disp_hom_ob_mor xx yy)

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
∏ (x0 : hom x y) (xx0 : disp_hom_ob_mor xx yy x0),
xx0 -->[ id₁ x0] xx0
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
(λ _ : ∏ (x0 : hom x y)
       (xx0 : disp_hom_ob_mor xx yy x0),
       xx0 -->[ id₁ x0] xx0,
 ∏ (x0 y0 z : hom x y) (f : hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧)
 (g : hom x y ⟦ y0, z ⟧)
 (xx0 : disp_hom_ob_mor xx yy x0)
 (yy0 : disp_hom_ob_mor xx yy y0)
 (zz : disp_hom_ob_mor xx yy z),
 xx0 -->[ f] yy0 → yy0 -->[ g] zz → xx0 -->[ f · g] zz)
  ?pr1

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
∏ (x0 : hom x y) (xx0 : disp_hom_ob_mor xx yy x0),
xx0 -->[ id₁ x0] xx0
 exact (λ f ff, disp_id2 ff).
    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
(λ _ : ∏ (x0 : hom x y)
       (xx0 : disp_hom_ob_mor xx yy x0),
       xx0 -->[ id₁ x0] xx0,
 ∏ (x0 y0 z : hom x y) (f : hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧)
 (g : hom x y ⟦ y0, z ⟧)
 (xx0 : disp_hom_ob_mor xx yy x0)
 (yy0 : disp_hom_ob_mor xx yy y0)
 (zz : disp_hom_ob_mor xx yy z),
 xx0 -->[ f] yy0 → yy0 -->[ g] zz → xx0 -->[ f · g] zz)
  (λ (f : hom x y) (ff : disp_hom_ob_mor xx yy f),
   disp_id2 ff)
 exact (λ f g h α β ff gg hh αα ββ, αα •• ββ).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat_data (hom x y)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat_data (hom x y)

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat_ob_mor (hom x y)
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat_id_comp (hom x y) ?pr1

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat_ob_mor (hom x y)
 exact (disp_hom_ob_mor xx yy).
    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat_id_comp (hom x y) (disp_hom_ob_mor xx yy)
 exact (disp_hom_id_comp xx yy).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat_axioms (hom x y) (disp_hom_data xx yy)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat_axioms (hom x y) (disp_hom_data xx yy)

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
x0, y0: hom x y
f: hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧
xx0: disp_hom_data xx yy x0
yy0: pr1 (disp_hom_data xx yy) y0
ff: xx0 -->[ f] yy0
disp_id2 xx0 •• ff =
transportb (mor_disp xx0 yy0) (id_left f) ff
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
x0, y0: hom x y
f: hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧
xx0: disp_hom_data xx yy x0
yy0: pr1 (disp_hom_data xx yy) y0
ff: xx0 -->[ f] yy0
ff •• disp_id2 yy0 =
transportb (mor_disp xx0 yy0) (id_right f) ff
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
x0, y0, z, w: hom x y
f: hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧
g: hom x y ⟦ y0, z ⟧
h: hom x y ⟦ z, w ⟧
xx0: disp_hom_data xx yy x0
yy0: disp_hom_data xx yy y0
zz: disp_hom_data xx yy z
ww: disp_hom_data xx yy w
ff: xx0 -->[ f] yy0
gg: yy0 -->[ g] zz
hh: zz -->[ h] ww
ff •• (gg •• hh) =
transportb (mor_disp xx0 ww) (assoc f g h)
  ((ff •• gg) •• hh)
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
x0, y0: hom x y
f: hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧
xx0: disp_hom_data xx yy x0
yy0: disp_hom_data xx yy y0
isaset (xx0 ==>[ f] yy0)

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
x0, y0: hom x y
f: hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧
xx0: disp_hom_data xx yy x0
yy0: pr1 (disp_hom_data xx yy) y0
ff: xx0 -->[ f] yy0
disp_id2 xx0 •• ff =
transportb (mor_disp xx0 yy0) (id_left f) ff
 
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
x0, y0: hom x y
f: hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧
xx0: disp_hom_data xx yy x0
yy0: pr1 (disp_hom_data xx yy) y0
ff: xx0 -->[ f] yy0
transportb (λ α : x0 ==> y0, xx0 ==>[ α] yy0)
  (id2_left f) ff =
transportb (mor_disp xx0 yy0) (id_left f) ff

      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
x0, y0: hom x y
f: hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧
xx0: disp_hom_data xx yy x0
yy0: pr1 (disp_hom_data xx yy) y0
ff: xx0 -->[ f] yy0
id2_left f = id_left f

      apply cellset_property.
    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
x0, y0: hom x y
f: hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧
xx0: disp_hom_data xx yy x0
yy0: pr1 (disp_hom_data xx yy) y0
ff: xx0 -->[ f] yy0
ff •• disp_id2 yy0 =
transportb (mor_disp xx0 yy0) (id_right f) ff
 
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
x0, y0: hom x y
f: hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧
xx0: disp_hom_data xx yy x0
yy0: pr1 (disp_hom_data xx yy) y0
ff: xx0 -->[ f] yy0
transportb (λ α : x0 ==> y0, xx0 ==>[ α] yy0)
  (id2_right f) ff =
transportb (mor_disp xx0 yy0) (id_right f) ff

      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
x0, y0: hom x y
f: hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧
xx0: disp_hom_data xx yy x0
yy0: pr1 (disp_hom_data xx yy) y0
ff: xx0 -->[ f] yy0
id2_right f = id_right f

      apply cellset_property.
    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
x0, y0, z, w: hom x y
f: hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧
g: hom x y ⟦ y0, z ⟧
h: hom x y ⟦ z, w ⟧
xx0: disp_hom_data xx yy x0
yy0: disp_hom_data xx yy y0
zz: disp_hom_data xx yy z
ww: disp_hom_data xx yy w
ff: xx0 -->[ f] yy0
gg: yy0 -->[ g] zz
hh: zz -->[ h] ww
ff •• (gg •• hh) =
transportb (mor_disp xx0 ww) (assoc f g h)
  ((ff •• gg) •• hh)
 
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
x0, y0, z, w: hom x y
f: hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧
g: hom x y ⟦ y0, z ⟧
h: hom x y ⟦ z, w ⟧
xx0: disp_hom_data xx yy x0
yy0: disp_hom_data xx yy y0
zz: disp_hom_data xx yy z
ww: disp_hom_data xx yy w
ff: xx0 -->[ f] yy0
gg: yy0 -->[ g] zz
hh: zz -->[ h] ww
transportb (λ α : x0 ==> w, xx0 ==>[ α] ww)
  (vassocr f g h) ((ff •• gg) •• hh) =
transportb (mor_disp xx0 ww) (assoc f g h)
  ((ff •• gg) •• hh)

      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
x0, y0, z, w: hom x y
f: hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧
g: hom x y ⟦ y0, z ⟧
h: hom x y ⟦ z, w ⟧
xx0: disp_hom_data xx yy x0
yy0: disp_hom_data xx yy y0
zz: disp_hom_data xx yy z
ww: disp_hom_data xx yy w
ff: xx0 -->[ f] yy0
gg: yy0 -->[ g] zz
hh: zz -->[ h] ww
vassocr f g h = assoc f g h

      apply cellset_property.
    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
x0, y0: hom x y
f: hom x y ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧
xx0: disp_hom_data xx yy x0
yy0: disp_hom_data xx yy y0
isaset (xx0 ==>[ f] yy0)
 apply D.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat (hom x y)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat (hom x y)

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat_data (hom x y)
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat_axioms (hom x y) ?pr1

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat_data (hom x y)
 exact (disp_hom_data xx yy).
    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
xx: D x
yy: D y
disp_cat_axioms (hom x y) (disp_hom_data xx yy)
 exact (disp_hom_laws xx yy).
  Defined.
End HomDisplayedCategory.

(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(** ** Notations.                                                                      *)
(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)

Module Notations.

Export Bicat.Notations.

Notation "f' ==>[ x ] g'" := (disp_2cells x f' g') (at level 60).
Notation "f' <==[ x ] g'" := (disp_2cells x g' f') (at level 60, only parsing).
Notation "rr •• ss" := (disp_vcomp2 rr ss) (at level 60).
Notation "ff ◃◃ rr" := (disp_lwhisker ff rr) (at level 60).
Notation "rr ▹▹ gg" := (disp_rwhisker gg rr) (at level 60).

End Notations.
